description:
I'm Rob Hamilton. 🇦🇺 Motorcycles, cars, adventure, and art are what give me the FEELZ. ⚡

I started off as an automotive electrician turned professional musician and photographer. Now I'm a full-time video creator and Global Ambassador of Insta360, living out my dreams.

Between filming, editing, camping, and traveling on two wheels and four, I've also been slowly building Feelz Garage and sim racing.

My life's been pretty crazy. Maybe it's because I'm a little crazy.

Always moving. Always pushing. Always learning, exploring, and trying to better myself. Always in awe of life's magic. Always honored to be of service. Always grateful and mind-blown that I get to be myself and do what I love. 

Join me on our shared journey. Feel free to subscribe!

description:
Dr. Lali, at your service! I'm a motorcycle loving scientist. 🤓🏍️ Here to teach, entertain, and ride! 

▼ON YOUTUBE▼
I am a creator and motovlogger (riding an MT07 named Spicy Boi), and sharing tips that help other motorcycle enthusiasts & new riders. I want to educate and help you discover that motorcycles are fun, and riding can become a sport you can enjoy for a lifetime.

▼MORE ABOUT ME▼
I'm an overall nerd who likes to ride and I have a PhD in biomedical science to REALLY immortalize my nerd status. I really love birds and have a pet cockatiel named Duchess. I was born and lived in Romania (salut!) and now live in the US. My mission statement is to be excellent to myself and others, to never stop learning, and to share my passions and inspire others to share theirs.

description:
During some rare downtime on shift, an idea was hatched in the Ambulance between crew mates, and you've stumbled on the result. 
I'm a Female Paramedic who after falling in love with Motorcycle riding am embarking as a moto traveller, with zero experience, on a trial and error search for Rest Day peace. 

The middle aged crisis is real, and often results in  "Where am I,  Who am I, and What am I doing?" moments, so you may enjoy this stripped back, no frills, honest account where I try to learn from my mistakes.  😏

Rest Days for those in the Ambulance Service are valued, so feel free to follow as I search for peace, quiet and to recharge the batteries, while trying not to die in the process.

Facebook / Insta - Rest Day Rider

#restdayrider #bikerchick #bikersofinstagram #ladybikers #insta360onex2 #quadlock #motorcyclecamping #motovlog #womanrider #moto #motorcycletravel #bikelife #cfmoto #lonerider #cfmoto450mt #hondashadow #bobber

description:
Riding BMW motorcycles, Kawasaki sport bikes, Harley Davidson or anything on two wheels, and motovlogging about riding them, is what I love to do. Explaining how to ride, stoppie, drift or how to do burnouts on your bike, is what I love to do! Riding, racing, group rides, drifting, motorcycles, or street riding with motorcycle insurance, gasoline in the tank, and new tires on the bikes! Currently on a 2004 636 Kawasaki Ninja street bike, a 2009 Harley 1200, and a Honda Grom! 
If you like cool motovlogs and a fun new taste on the sport bike scene, you have come to the right channel for all your motorcycle questions and how to videos! Being a moto vlogger that pushes the limits on bikes is all part of the lifestyle!
brian_636 has been on bikes all over the United States of America and has close ties with some of the best out there from Gixxer Brah, Ghost Racing, Cbear Stunts, Imkay, and many more riders from across the Streets of America!

description:
Meow 😻

We’re Dean & Nala, and we’ve been best friends since December 2018. I was cycling around the world when I heard Nala meowing out for me somewhere in the Bosnian mountains. With no intentions of keeping her, I shoved her in the front bag of my bike and snuck her over the border to get her to a vet and help her find a home. However, Nala quickly climbed out of the front bag and climbed straight onto my shoulder and fell asleep. Since then, we’ve been travelling the world together. So feel free to tag along if you’re interested in following our journey and adventures around the globe ❤️

description:
Fat Lad on a Bike is brought to you to show you the continuing adventures of myself, Steve  Clark with various friends and fellow 
bikers as we embark on days out, weeks away and soon recording Tours of Europe.

This is the perfect way to combine my love of Motorcycling, Photography and to further my knowledge of video work.

I have a BMW R1200RT which I call the Flying Armchair. As the name suggests, is luxurious to ride.

For filming whilst riding, I use the Drift Ghost S Helmet Camera. For doing handheld off the bike I use a Panasonic X900. If taking stills, I use a Canon 5D MK111 with various lenses.

I would ask that you please subscribe, as I believe the videos will improve as I continue to further advance my editing skills.
A mention here, the editing is done using Sony Vegas 14 Software.

If you have any questions regarding my channel, please ask, I will do my best to answer them.

Thank You for taking the time to view, hope to see you again.

description:
Need reliable information about motorcycle trips, motorcycle travel, and adventure riding? Looking for practical motorcycle tips, long-distance touring advice, travel hacks, and real experience from the road? This channel is made for riders who want to improve their skills, prepare better, and enjoy safer, smarter, and more confident motorcycle journeys.

My name is Pavlin, and for over fifteen years, I’ve been traveling the world on two wheels. Through thousands of kilometers of adventure riding, off-road challenges, remote routes, and long-distance motorcycle trips, I’ve learned what truly matters when you’re far from home.

Here you’ll find motorcycle travel advice, gear recommendations, route planning ideas, riding techniques, and inspiration to finally start your own dream adventure. If you want to become a better long-distance rider and gain real knowledge from real experience, you are welcome. Your motorcycle journey starts here.

description:
IT'S NEVER TOO LATE!

There are lots of great Moto Vloggers out there putting out brilliant content for adventure motorcycling, big trip touring, bike reviewing, technical fixes, etc. All of them doing a great job! This channel is different. We are a couple who came to riding late in our lives (50 and 53) and wanted to encourage all of you out there who might think it's too late to start to get geared up, get your leathers on and just ride!   We're no experts, we've no idea how to fix mechanical problems, we just love riding our bikes. If you ride as a couple and/or came to biking late you might find our channel of interest. If so, please like, subscribe and comment. We look forward to hearing from you!

description:
We're Ori and Kaito, a couple from Colombia and Japan with a simple yet thrilling goal: exploring the world on two motorcycles without an end date. 

Let us share how our love for bikes began and brought us together on unforgettable journeys. Ori, originally from Colombia, wasn't into motorcycles until she met Kaito, whose passion sparked her interest. In 2020, she got her license in Japan and tackled restoring a beat-up 1983 Honda GB250. This bike kickstarted our adventures across Japan and ignited Ori's passion for motorcycles. Meanwhile, Kaito, inspired by his father's passion for motorcycles, got his license at 17. While living in France, he delved deeper into the world of motorcycles by fixing up a bike he used to ride. Together, we've explored Japan and Colombia, discovering the beauty of these places on our motorcycles.

Join us on our YouTube channel as we share our adventures, restoration projects, and the joy of exploring new roads and cultures on two wheels!

description:
Motorcyclist is the leading publication for motorcycle reviews and motorcycle news for more than 110 years. Founded in 1912 as Pacific Motorcycling, the pubication grew into an internationally renowned publication. Motorcyclist is committed to providing top-tier journalism and that dedication continues into our second century with premium 4k resolution videos.

Watch detailed technical assessments of new motorcycles. Listen to our industry-leading motorcycle reviews where you’ll learn about bikes before riding them. Our content shares intricate details of the latest cruisers, dirt bikes, street bikes and sportbikes, plus our full-length POV reviews are unparalleled.

We publish editorial on the newest motorcycles, compare motorcycles from different manufacturers and tour the globe on bikes designed for serious mileage.

Settle in for the motorcycle content you crave—Motorcyclist has you covered.

description:
The BikeRadar channel is your dependable and comprehensive resource for cycling reviews, tech news, riding advice and how-to guides.

Our presenters are real cyclists with many years of testing experience between them, so you can trust our expert reviews.

We love to get stuck into our own challenges, while still having a laugh. Watch our BikeRadar Diaries series to see what we like to get up to in our spare time.  

All of us who bring BikeRadar to life are committed to creating content that reflects and celebrates the diverse backgrounds and interests of our readers, and the cycling community as a whole. 

While we always strive to be inclusive, we need to do better and have begun work on a plan to drive meaningful change, but we know it’s a work in progress. 

We’d love to hear from you and are open to suggestions on how we can create positive change together. If you’ve got a story to share or would like to get involved, email us at news@bikeradar.com

description:
Rider, filmmaker, and the original MOTONOMAD! I’m Adam Riemann, creator of Motology Films.

I started Motology Films back in 2009 to capture the art of motorcycling through my lens. As one of the pioneers of off-road enduro and adventure motorcycle content in Australia, everything on this channel comes from the seat of my bike.

With over 30 years in the industry riding and racing, and thousands of kilometres exploring the globe on two-wheels in some of the most epic locations on the planet, it’s the places, the lessons, and everything I’ve learned along the way that I share here with you. Motorcycling isn’t just something I do, it’s how I live, and it’s what has built my life.

So get onboard, subscribe, and join the growing Motology community. 

GET IT DONE.

description:
I am the Dork in the Road and I want to be your Internet Riding Buddy.  Motorcycle adventure is my passion.  

Adventure is for everyone, and I want to help others see how easy it is to just get out there and make it happen.  

I don’t claim to be an expert.  I’m just your average overweight, middle-aged, bearded dude out there making it up as I go. Every new adventure has something to teach me.  Thank you for joining me along the way. 

MY MISSION: to inspire, educate, and empower others to have adventures of their own.

New content every Monday and Wednesday morning, with the occasional bonus Friday vid or stream.

Disclaimer for reasons: I am not a professional journalist, expert motorcycle rider, or a mechanic.  These videos are for entertainment purposes and represent my personal opinions and experiences.  I'm just a dude who isn't even good at riding or making videos, so be smart and don't risk life or limb trying to follow my example or advice.

description:
G’day legends, I’m Artist Wayne…

In a world of dust, drama, and questionable decisions… one bloke sets out to ride it all.

This channel started as an art journey—but somewhere along the way, the throttle twisted, the dirt started flying, and things got a little out of control.

Now it’s all about adventure riding across Australia’s toughest tracks, epic multi-day rides, gear put through the infamous Artist Wayne Pressure Test, and a cast of characters that bring the DRAMA every single time.

Expect crashes, chaos, cinematic rides, and the occasional miracle survival.

Whether it’s the Ténéré 700, wild bush tracks, or the Magnificent Seven Ride series… if it’s got two wheels and a bit of danger—I'm in.

Hit subscribe and come along for the ride.

It’s going to get dusty.

description:
Koldo Burgoa, that´s my name, and I quit my job as a primary school teacher, to begin travelling around the world on motorbike. A nomadic life, I go enjoying more and more day by day. This channel is about travel on motorbike, but also I will try to get you closer to the cultures I´m visiting, goving travelling tips and advices and trying that next travellers can organice their trips better than me.

Right now Im travelling South America on my motorbike, just with my saving; trying to get to places that normally not a lot of travellers do. On or Off road, just looking for the beauty in the landscape and in people souls.

description:
Empezó hace 10 años grabando su camino al trabajo.
Hoy, más de un millón de personas siguen sus locuras sobre dos ruedas. 

Nadie sabe quién se esconde bajo el casco, pero cada jueves a las 22h el caos, las risas y la adrenalina están garantizados.
Viajes, pruebas, consejos, caídas y humor sin filtros. 

Aquí no hay postureo: Solo pasión motera, y oh, también muchísimos fails.
Ya que es el canal más real que vas a encontrar.

Suscríbete a la locura. Porque aquí no se ve la moto… se siente.

description:
🎮🏍️ ¡Bienvenido al canal de Lucas Toledo! 🏍️🎮

¿Te apasionan las motos y los videojuegos? ¡Estás en el lugar correcto! En este canal, combino la adrenalina de las dos ruedas con la emoción de los videojuegos. Desde gameplays intensos de títulos como Mirror’s Edge y Minecraft hasta emocionantes aventuras en moto, aquí encontrarás contenido que acelera el pulso y despierta la imaginación.

Soy Lucas, un entusiasta de la velocidad y los píxeles. Me encanta explorar nuevos mundos virtuales y reales, compartiendo cada experiencia con ustedes. Si buscas entretenimiento, emoción y una comunidad vibrante, ¡suscríbete y únete a esta aventura!

description:
¡Bienvenido a SANMAR Adventure! 

Aquí no solo hablamos de motos, vivimos la aventura real. Desde sobrevivir a 1.300 km en pleno invierno con lo mínimo , hasta localizar los puntos más exigentes de la GEOKANA 2026 

En este canal encontrarás la cara honesta del mototurismo: 
✅ Rutas Épicas: Del desierto de Almería a la mítica Transpirenaica.
 ✅ Pruebas a fondo: Test de uso real de la Rieju Xplora 707.
 ✅ Eventos y Comunidad: Crónicas desde  la Xtreme Challenge, Geokana y grandes concentraciones como Faro.

Mi objetivo es demostrar que para viajar no hace falta tenerlo todo, sino las ganas de arrancar. Si buscas consejos técnicos, rutas que quitan el aliento y una comunidad que no se detiene ante el frío o el barro, este es tu sitio.

¡Suscríbete y únete a la aventura!

description:
Fala galera Renato na area blz? kkkkk
De todos que já me perguntaram do que é meu canal eu nunca soube responder kkkkkk
Meu canal é praticamente filmar minha vida e minhas loucuras diárias, eu não sou um personagem, não sou um ator ! Eu sou eu mesmo, lógico que temos dias bons e dias ruins, mais eu nunca mudei por fama ou dinheiro ! 
Bom minha historia começa em 2011, quando eu tinha acabado de sair do meu emprego de empacotador de mercado e virei motoboy, sendo entregador de moto eu conseguia gravar mais para meu canal e assim foi sendo minha vida ! 
De entregador de moto eu fui para outro emprego como Servente em uma empresa aqui na minha cidade e quando assim do nada, em 2016 eu comecei a ter muitas visualizações aqui no YouTube e então eu decidi sair da obra e viver minha carreira como YouTuber e aqui estou EU !!!
Eu era uma pessoa bem simples, bem humilde financeiramente e hoje vivo um sonho sem fim! Sou muito grato por todos que me seguem de coração 
Então boraaa e CHAMAAA !

🚗 BEM-VINDO AO REIS GAMERS – ONDE TUDO COMEÇA DO ZERO E TERMINA NO TOPO!
Se você curte histórias épicas, carros insanos, jogos mobile e novidades quentes do mundo gamer, esse canal é o seu novo ponto de encontro!

🎬 O que você encontra por aqui:
• Histórias como “Fui de Pobre a Milionário” dentro dos jogos
• Desafios tipo Carro de 1 real vs Carro de 999 mil
• Histórias de carros com ação, emoção e zoeira

description: Bem-vindo ao Cláudio XJ6 – Dicas e Aventuras de Moto! 🏍️ Sou Cláudio, apaixonado por duas rodas, e aqui compartilho tudo sobre a Yamaha XJ6 e o mundo das motos. バイクで絶景を見に行ったり、街中をブラブラ走ったり、適当な話をしたりしてます。
最近は廃虚や団地などをはじめ、千葉の変な所を巡っています！
口が悪かったり、メインと関係ない話をしたりしていますが、ご容赦くださいm(__)m

よろしくお願い致します!!

description:
★バイクと飯と、ときどき車★

X・インスタは「ごじゃし！」で検索！
・X→次回モトブログの予告をメインに更新
・Instagram→日常のバイク写真をメインに更新

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
バイク系YouTuber、ごじゃし！です。
"ごじゃし"とは地元兵庫の方言で「ごじゃ（むちゃくちゃ）」＋「 しい（するひと）」という意味。

現在の取り扱いテーマは以下の通り。
・ソロツーリング、マスツーリング（バイク女子紹介）
・気になるバイクの試乗インプレ
・バイクで行けるグルメなお店の食レポ
など、複数ジャンルのバイクライフをお届けしていきます。
動画を観て面白いと思った方は、高評価・コメント・チャンネル登録をお待ちしております！

現在、カリスマ無職（当時）の脳筋ライダーから数々のレッテルを貼られている。
・バイク女子斡旋チャンネルのエ〇店長（一部事実）
・汁〇優（事実無根）

乗車バイク
・SUZUKI GSX250R エクスターカラー ABS 2017年式 逆輸入モデル
・HONDA CB750（RC42）ブラック 2002年式

description:
『ときどきお馬鹿でクレイジーなフレンズとのモトブログ』


【チャンネルの説明】

バイクの魅力を多くの人へ届けることを使命とし、
国内や海外ツーリング
ライダーの何気ない日常
バイク用品やお役立ちグッズの紹介レビュー
視聴者の皆さんと交流型の生放送
などの動画を週二本のペースで投稿しています。

僕たちの動画がきっかけで若いライダーが増えること、子育てを終えたおじさまがリターンライダーとして戻ってくること、峰不二子に憧れた美人のおねいさんがライダーになることを期待しています。

アンチビクスクは特に中高生をはじめとする若い世代の視聴者が多く、バイクにあこがれを持っている子からは勿論、もともとバイクに興味がなかった子からも
「動画を見るようになってからバイクが好きになりました」「免許取得しました」という声をたくさん頂きます。
我々はライダーデビューを夢見るバイクキッズ達を応援しています。


チャンネルメンバー登録はこちらからお願いいたします→https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRyxg-1JNH73EaCysV3MaPw/join

description:
Maybe you're like us and want a peaceful life of freedom and independence in the country. 

When we lived in the city that is exactly what we dreamed of. In the city were dependent on someone else to provide us with everything we needed, like electricity, water, and food. We knew that if any one of those systems failed we would be stuck and need someone to rescue us. 

So, we packed up our family and moved to a 7-acre piece of raw land in North Idaho. 

We’re just regular middle-class folks with very little practical experience in building, gardening, or raising animals. But, we were willing to give it a shot and couldn’t be happier with our decision.

If inexperienced people like us can become debt-free and find a peaceful life of freedom and independence in the country, so can you. We’ll show you how by sharing the skills and tips needed to make the move through our inspirational videos. 

For business/sponsorship inquires: martinjohnsonoffgridliving@wildamerica.management

description:
Willkommen auf meinem YouTube Kanal, wo das Leben nie langweilig wird! 

Bist du auch so verrückt nach dem Begrenzer eines Motors, dass du im Schlaf den Gasgriff drehst? Oder lebst du einfach für die Freiheit auf zwei Rädern? Dann bist du hier genau richtig, Habibi! Auf meinem Kanal siehst Du die steilsten Motorrad-Abenteuer, verrückte Dating-Geschichten, krasse Events und epische Roadtrips - alles auf dem Motorrad!

Mit einem Schuss Romantik und jeder Menge Humor. Meine Dating-Geschichten auf zwei Rädern sind sicher ein Highlight.

Natürlich geht's nicht nur ums Fahren. Meine Kumpels sind mindestens so verrückt wie ich! Wir lassen Schwachsinn von uns, der Dich vor Lachen vom Sitz kippen lässt und ja, da ist auch der ein oder andere Streich dabei.

Vergiss nicht, das Leben ist wie eine unerwartete Bodenwelle - es kann holprig sein, aber mit einem Lächeln auf dem Gesicht ist jede Fahrt ein Abenteuer! 😂🛣️

description:
Ich heiße Sandro und ich bin Motorradfahrer auf einer Yamaha YZF-R7. Überwiegend im Umkreis von Leipzig unterwegs, wo ich  die tollsten Dinge auf der Straße erlebe. Vorn am Helm ist meine GoPro befestigt, welche das Gesehen um mich herum, und vor allem meine Stimme in UHD ("4K") und aus der Ego-Perspektive aufnimmt. Meine persönlichen Highlights schneide ich in diesen Videos zusammen. Dies tue ich in erster Linie für mich, aber wer Spaß dran hat darf sie sich natürlich auch ansehen.

description:
Welcome!!!! First time hearing about Axel?? Well, WELCOME! Here's a little about me:

I’m the owner of Axel Co, invited builder at Born Free 13, and creator/host of Axel’s Hideout. I ride Harley-Davidson choppers, own an excessive number of bikes, and I’ve been in this industry long before it was popular. I gained 20,000 Instagram followers the first week Instagram was alive and haven't stopped growing on there since.

I’ve written for 20+ motorcycle magazines, ridden on TV including RIDE with Norman Reedus, and create content and ads for brands that want something cool.

I founded one of the largest women’s motorcycle gatherings in the world and hosted Canada’s largest chopper show.
I’m a Canadian who came to the U.S. on a special ability visa and built this from the ground up.

Sponsored by Bell Helmets, Russ Brown Motorcycle Attorneys, and Randolph Eyewear

My website AXEL CO: www.actuallyitsaxel.com
Instagram and TikTok: @actuallyitsaxel

Partnership contact: goebelbecky@gmail.com

description:
GOT2GO by LEA RIECK: OVERLANDING FOR EVERYONE
I'm Lea Rieck and I invite you to join my overlanding journey on a motorcycle and in a van! 
Exploring the world – not tourist destinations and going to places most other people don't.
I circumnavigated the world solo from 2016-2017 and now I am visiting all the places that I have missed out on earlier.

description:
New adventures across France every week—hidden roads, forgotten places, and unforgettable rides.

I'm Bvaporú, a Dominican living in France, and this channel is about more than motorcycles, this channel is about adventure, freedom, and enjoying life.

Most of my adventures happen on my Zontes 125 Scrambler X (for now).
You'll also find hiking, canoeing, road trips, local discoveries, and anything that makes life worth exploring.

I'm not a professional rider or travel expert just someone who loves discovering new places and sharing the journey with you. 

Every ride is a new story, every destination is a new adventure, and every video is another memory created together.

New video will be posted every week.

If you enjoy travel, nature, and authentic adventures, subscribe and come along for the ride.

Dominican Roots • French Roads 

📍 France 
🏍️ Zontes 125 Scrambler X 2025
🎥 Adventure • MotoVlogs • Travel • Hidden Places • Outdoor Life

Follow me on Instagram and tiktok: @bvaporu

My motorcycle is a 1987 Yamaha Tenere, completely restored and with some amazing modifications - my motorcycle and I are the same age! 

I share my adventures here on YouTube every Wednesday and Sunday! Welcome to the channel and I hope you'll enjoy the ride!

description:
Cycle World, America's largest motorcycle media brand, works hard to deliver the full experience of motorcycling not only through words but video.
 
Offering a visual experience of motorcycle reviews, performance tests and shows, Cycle World's moto-journalistic style helps keep enthusiasts up-to-date on all the motorcycle industry's news.
 
Launched in 1962, Cycle World was created to be a high-quality motorcycle magazine founded on strong journalistic standards. Cycle World magazine was a pioneer in participatory moto-journalism, in which Cycle World editors actively participated in races and events as competitors to write the stories for the magazine.
 
Cycle World still continues to lead its category with in-depth, objective road tests as well as motorcycle and gear reviews.

description:
STEPHEN (WOLFY) SMITH… Over ten years ago I was hiking in South America when I met a couple of Adventure Riders crossing the Andes on their BMW 1150 GS motors. I realised then and there I was tired of trekking and wanted to ride my adventures.

I started Adventure Moto with the idea of bringing in the best gear and parts I would ride with on my own Adventures. I’m not an ex-pro racer, I don’t think I am a better rider than the next bloke, I just love being a 95%er, that is someone who would rather be riding dirt and trail than the blacktop.

We have become the premier supplier in Australia of the best gear for riders that seek the road less travelled. Our team members are all riders and personally believe in the gear we sell. Life is full of choices. You choose to ride and we choose to give you the best choices in products for your adventures! We offer service, warranty and advice with a smile and energy that relays our passion for what what we do and who we are.

description:
Nomadic by choice. Wild by nature. No backup plan.

I ride alone into remote places on a Royal Enfield Himalayan with no financial safety net and no stable base. 

If this works, I keep my freedom. If it doesn’t, I lose everything.

I had the option of comfort. A normal life. A predictable future. But I chose a life of adventure.

Hello Road Nomads. I’m Nata. I’ve been nomadic for 20 years, crossing continents on two wheels and on foot. Chasing horizons is the only life that makes sense to me.

Wild camping. Fixing my own bike. Riding gravel, storms, and long empty roads. Making decisions that could end the trip. This is my daily life.

No filters. No scripts. No safety net. Just the road, the risk, and the obsession to make it work.

description: It's my channel and I'll do what I want. Motorcycle riding, travel adventures, and general motorcycle and camping content. I'm learning to not give a shit about what random strangers on YouTube think about me. I'm currently riding a 2017 BMW R1200RS on the road and for longer tours. I have a 2024 Royal Enfield Himalayan 450 for off-road and camping close to home on the Sunshine Coast of British Columbia, Canada. Any income I generate from this channel goes to pay for my motorcycle habit. I'm retired, so I'm not motivated by money from this channel. I just want to continue riding for as long as I can. I'm keeping sponsorship to a minimum. OnX because mapping and getting out into the bush are important to me. Others, if they really align with my needs.

description:
Welcome to the channel of a real Roman biker! 🏍️🇮🇹

My name is Luca and I am passionate about two wheels and the freedom they bring. Through this channel, I combine my love for motorcycles with my passion for Rome and its surroundings

Join me as I ride through the busy streets of the Eternal City, cruise along scenic highways, and explore hidden routes that only a local biker knows. 🏛️🛣️ Imagine riding past ancient ruins, weaving through traffic with the Colosseum in the background, or feeling the rush of speed on open roads under the Roman sun.

What sets this channel apart is my local knowledge as a Roman motorcyclist, sharing real experiences and offering a glimpse into what it's like to ride in one of the world's most iconic cities.

Let's hit the road together, fast, free and full of adrenaline. Drive Rome, drive free! 🏍️🔥🌍

description:
Miguel Lima | Solo overland expedition towards Central Asia. At 55, I left the corporate world to live on the road, one kilometer at a time. Crossing the globe on a CFMOTO MT 800X, dealing head-on with road hazards, border crossings, and the elements.

What you'll find here: The raw, unfiltered side of Moto Travel. Flat tires, heavy bureaucracy, remote routes, and cultural shocks across Europe, the Balkans, the Caucasus, and Russia. No scripts, just logistical survival and asphalt.

Subscribe to follow this two-wheeled rescue of time.
Motto: Life is a Journey, Ride It.
Motorcycle: CFMOTO MT 800X
Origin: Portugal 🇵🇹

description:
I’m a British expat living in rural Cebu with my Filipina wife and two daughters — and I’ve been here since 2014.

This channel is all about life in the Philippines — from the saddle of a motorbike to the heart of a Filipino home. I explore backroads, tell honest stories about raising a family here, and share what it’s really like to live, ride, and build a life as a foreigner in this beautiful country.

Expect motovlogs, expat tips, family life, cost of living insights, and the occasional bit of photography — all through the lens of someone who’s lived here for over a decade.

Whether you’re dreaming of moving to the Philippines or just love a good story — welcome to Triple B.

description:
I traveled full-time for eight and a half years, from age 19 to 27. My travels took me to over 75 different countries, allowed me to learn lots about the beautiful world we live in and meet lots of wonderful people.

I'm forever grateful for this experience and I'm happy I managed to record a few of my travels to share with the world. I hope my videos will inspire more young people to travel the world and live life on their own terms. 

After all... life's short, why waste a second?

Welcome to Dragger Z900– A Moto-Vlogging Experience with a Creative Twist!
Every reaction you see—whether from girls or guys—is fully scripted and shot with consent as part of our storytelling format. While the videos may seem like spontaneous one-day rides, they are actually the result of days of planned shoots, scripting, and editing. Nothing is random—everything is designed for entertainment, with a focus on being completely respectful and harmless.

We strictly follow all road safety rules. Speedometer visuals are edited for cinematic effect—no laws are broken during filming.

DISCLAIMER: All content is fictional, edited, and staged for entertainment. Please do not attempt to recreate anything you see.

description:
My name is Alex Chacón from Texas USA. I'm an Award Winning Cinematographer who quit medical school at age 23, sold everything I had and drove my motorcycle from Alaska to Argentina in 500 days in 2012. I posted videos during my journey to bring people along for the adventure, and since then it has snow balled into what it is today. 

Now I do the same in a more professional and informative capacity as I continue to travel the world on different projects, personal goals and film ideas I want to capture. Documenting a profound Human Journey in quick cinematic short films, and behind the scenes vlogs

description:
Gustavo Santaolalla, the acclaimed Argentine musician, composer, and producer, has left an indelible mark on the music industry. 

Known for his distinctive fusion of rock and folk music, Santaolalla has collaborated with renowned artists and created iconic soundtracks. 

His compositions for films and video games, including the critically acclaimed "The Last of Us," have earned him accolades, including 2 Academy Awards for Babel and Brokeback Mountain, 1 Golden Globe, and 2 BAFTA. 

Santaolalla's versatility as a musician is evident in his ability to effortlessly blend genres and create evocative melodies that resonate with audiences around the world. Beyond his musical contributions, he is recognized for his commitment to social causes, using his platform to advocate for positive change. 

With a career spanning decades, Gustavo Santaolalla's musical legacy continues to inspire and enchant listeners, solidifying his status as a true visionary in the realm of music.

description:
Bike Shed Moto Co serves the moto community with our London and LA destinations, our huge annual moto shows, our social media and our storytelling channels.

In London and LA you can visit our cafe. bar, restaurant, lounge, club, retail, barbershop, tattoo and moto galleries, and at the end of May every year is our huge show at Tobacco Dock in London, welcoming ar0und 20,000 people a year to see 300+ curated custom motorcycles, with great hospitality live music, bars, retail and much more - which we will bring to LA in 2024.

Our Company is owned and run by motorcycle riders, but we are not a traditional biker destination, as we also welcome non-riders - we are For the People Who Love Motorcycles, and the People Who Love People Who Love Motorcycles.

Our main purpose is to offer Common Ground, in our real and online spaces, where our various communities can come together, set aside any differences, and celebrate what unites us all - a passion for two wheels.

description:
Recently described as "offbeat in a relatable way."
BugMoto is about what motorcycles teach us when we let them — about slowing down, riding alone with your thoughts, and finding something worth chasing on the other side of a long road. I see bikes as art, as therapy, as the perfect machines. Riding has become a huge part of what defines me, and motorcycle travel is the thing that brings me the most joy.
Say hello: dan@bugmoto.com — I read everything, even if it takes me a minute to write back.
Send me a postcard:
Dan Fellini
BugMoto
PO Box 11657
Portland, OR
USA

description:
Welcome to MOTOBLADE, the definitive channel for the complete Indian Motorcycle experience on YouTube.

As a commercial pilot, precision is my profession. As a long-term Indian Chieftain Dark Horse owner, I apply that same expert standard to everything I do.

This channel is about more than just the bike; it's about the journey. Join me for epic motovlogs as we tackle legendary roads like Route 66, explore America's National Parks, and take you inside the legendary Sturgis rally.

We also go deep on the machines themselves. Get honest, data-driven reviews of the entire Indian lineup, from the Scout to the Pursuit. You'll find real-world gear reviews and modification guides for the American V-Twin rider, all tested over thousands of miles.

This channel is for the serious rider who demands expert insight on what to buy, how to mod it, and where to ride it.

Join our community of thousands. Subscribe now.

description:
Welcome to 2LaneLife—where we trade the interstate for the open road to find the authentic, untold stories of America's back roads.

Dedicated to capturing the raw beauty of motorcycle travel from the saddle of our Harley Davidsons, we use a unique, cinematic approach to tell our story. For us, the 2Lanes are where the real adventure lies. Our mission is to explore neat history, discover hidden gems, and experience the iconic roadside attractions that define American culture. Along every mile, we meet incredible people, learn something new, and immerse ourselves in the journey.

Join the 2LaneLife community on the ultimate American journey!

► SUBSCRIBE for more epic cinematic motorcycle adventures!
► COMMENT below and tell us your favorite back road!

description: Indestructible MFG was founded in 2018 by tattoo artist Matt Vanasse and ex-barber Dan Brenndorfer. Originally a basement hobby in a barbershop, the brand has now become recognized worldwide, sold in countries far and wide. The brand is steeped in the tradition of tattooing, as well as alternative music and motorcycle culture. At the heart of Indestructible's aesthetic is a strong sense of community, a deep connection to traditional tattooing, and unwavering customer loyalty. Based in Toronto, the brand is renowned for crafting simple yet bold pieces that pay homage to timeless traditions.

description:
Impressum | Willkommen beim YouTube-Kanal vom Rheinlandtourer, der Kanal für Motorradtouren im Rheinland. Aber auch Motorradreisen in weitere Regionen. Die Region NRW, Rheinland-Pfalz, Gegenden wie Westerwald, das Bergische Land, der Rhein-Sieg oder die Eifel sind tolle Motorradgegenden, schnell aus der Region Köln und Bonn zu erreichen und ideal für Tagestouren und Kurztrips. Rheinlandtourer erstellt in erster Linie Videos über Touren, die an einem Tag oder auch mal nach Feierabend zu realisieren sind. Viele Informationen über die Region fließen mit ein. Natürlich sollen auch zukünftig längere Touren gezeigt werden unter dem Motto der Rheinlandtourer unterwegs. Rheinlandtourer ist Michael Klein, Fotografenmeister und Kameramann.

description:
Welcome to ride4awhile – your channel for special motorcycle tours!

Great to have you here! I'll take you on big and small getaways on two wheels. True to the motto ‘curves, cuisine, art and culture’, we'll travel across the country, along lonely roads, past lakes and through forests or mountains.

But it's not just about riding. Along the way, we'll sightsee, hike, fish, camp, cook, marvel and live.

Here you'll find videos full of freedom, nature and authentic experiences. No kitsch, just a lot of passion for everything that's possible outdoors.

Whether it's a trip, a day tour or a microadventure – the main thing is to get out. At least for a while.

You can find lots more information, including the imprint and tour dates, here:
https://www.ride4awhile.com

description: Seit über 10 Jahren brennen wir –Tim & Madi – für das Motorradfahren und legen jedes Jahr fast 30.000 Kilometer auf Europas atemberaubendsten Straßen zurück. Von spektakulären Alpenpässen über kurvige Küstenstraßen bis hin zu versteckten Geheimtipps abseits der bekannten Routen – wir sind ständig unterwegs und auf der Suche nach neuen Abenteuern. Hier teilen wir unsere Touren, die beeindruckendsten Strecken, persönliche Highlights und das Equipment, auf das wir vertrauen. Lass dich inspirieren und entdecke mit uns die Welt auf zwei Rädern!

description:
Herzlich willkommen auf unserem Kanal.

Wir sind Susanne & Rainer, zwei Best Ager mit der großen Leidenschaft dem Motorradfahren.
Wir sind On und Offroad on Tour, zu zweit oder alleine.
Wir wollen dich inspirieren, dir deine Reiseplanung erleichtern und dir den Mut geben, auf eigene Faust loszuziehen.
Auf unserem Kanal findest du unsere persönlichen Reisegeschichten, Routenvorschläge für dein nächstes Motorrad-Abenteuer und viele nützliche Tipps zur Planung deiner Reise.
Die Zeit, die wir unterwegs haben, ist uns so unglaublich wichtig.
Gute, relevante und glaubwürdige Informationen in kompakter Form sind für uns Gold wert.
Deshalb sollen unsere Tipps auch DICH konkret bei der Planung deiner nächsten Tour unterstützen.

Viel Spaß mit unseren Reisetipps und Informationen für deine Motorradtour.

description:
Motorrad Reisen bedeutet für Moni u. mich Freiheit, zu fahren, wo hin unsere Sehnsucht führt.
Fremdes Land, Straßen und Landschaften, antikes/neues für uns zu erkunden, sehen, riechen, den Wind zu spüren, Menschen am Wegesrand zu grüßen. 
Schluchten, Seen, und das Meer in meiner Nähe zu sehen und Kurven. Endorphine, mir wird warm ums Herz, die Augen werden feucht, die Mundwinkel zeigen nach oben.
Nach der Reise am PC ,sichere die Bilder und Videos, fühle ich mit dem Schneiden der Filme ein Stück weit im Urlaub, ich fahre wieder den Weg nach Lukomir, den Pass hoch zur Vikosschlucht in Hellas oder am türkischen Yanisli Gölü -Salzsee. Ich fliege mit der Zipline über die Taraschlucht und fahre mit dem Ballon in Göreme über das wunderschöne Land und habe vor Glück Tränen in den Augen.
Ich küsse und umarme Moni und möchte diese Reisen unendlich weiterfahren.
Mögen alle Motorradfahrer und Reisende die diese Videos sehen das gleiche erfahren wie ich und noch viel mehr.

description:
👋 ¡Bienvenidos a Un Dúo Por El Mundo! 🌎 Somos Paula y Juan David Colombianos que renunciamos a TODO para cumplir nuestro sueño de VIVIR VIAJANDO POR EL MUNDO. Nuestro primer objetivo es recorrer SURAMÉRICA en Moto 🛵 y unir COLOMBIA con USHUAIA. 

👉Cansados de una vida tradicional y monótona tomamos la decisión de salir a recorrer nuestro hermoso planeta en busca de una vida llena de AVENTURAS 🤘 Viajamos en una moto Royal Enfield Himalayan 411 y gracias a ella queremos mostrarte todo lo que tiene nuestro planeta para DESCUBRIR. 

¡SUSCRÍBETE! es GRATIS🔴 Haz parte de esta familia amante de los viajes en moto y la naturaleza, acompáñanos en esta aventura donde te llevaremos hasta el fin del mundo de ser posible ¿Te atreves?

description: Hello, how are you Partners, my name is Jose and I have always been interested in the world of motorcycles, initially I created the channel, due to the need to inform about new launches in my country, but little by little I realized that the market for Motorcycles is very similar in all Latin America, and I decided to add more general data in the information I give, In general in this Channel I like to share with you all the news, reviews, new releases and the latest news from the world of motorcycles , all as always with true information, official data and technical sheets of the brands, I always try to make in each description of each video, a section where I give the links of the information on which I base myself and the images and videos of which I use in the edition of that video, thus giving some credits, As always guys, the channel is reporting on behalf of the Biker Community 🔥

description:
Welcome to PRAMAC

PRAMAC's history begins in 1966, when the Campinoti family founded a construction equipment company. Over the years, PRAMAC evolved and transformed itself, expanding its product portfolio and becoming a global benchmark in the production of generators and warehouse material handling equipment.

With 17 operating branches and 6 manufacturing plants situated in Europe, Asia and South America, Pramac is present in 150 different countries where offers a wide and flexible product range to satisfy a whole spectrum of energy needs and to suit its customers from all over the world. From 2016, it is moreover part of the Generac Group, with which represents the world’s third biggest generator and lighting tower producer. 

www.pramac.com

description:
Ride Thru is a cinematic documentary channel following long-distance motorcycle journeys across Japan and beyond.

Project 47 documents a solo expedition through all 47 prefectures of Japan — one road, one region, and one chapter at a time. No support crew. No fixed route. Just the realities of life on the road.

These are slow, immersive travel documentaries built around atmosphere, endurance, isolation, weather, fatigue, chance encounters, and the changing landscapes of the journey itself.

New episodes every Tuesday and Friday.

description:
Türkiye'nin Trafik Kanalı'na Hoş Geldiniz! 

Türkiye'de yaşanmış motorcu kavgaları, motosiklet kazaları, motorcu olayları, polisten kaçış ve ceza yeme gibi anları eğitim, bilgi ve eğlence amacıyla sizler için paylaşıyorum.

Kanalım motorcular hakkında içerik üretmeye odaklıdır. Tüm videolarım, karayolunda nasıl güvenilir ve mantıklı sürüş yapılabileceği göz önünde bulundurularak hazırlanır. Diğer sürücülerin hatalarından ders almaya değer olduğunu düşünüyorum.

Sürüş sırasında kameralara yansıyan ilginç olayları sizlere, yani izleyiciye sunmak için Türkiye'nin dört bir yanından motorcularla çalışıyorum. Eğitici bir değer taşıması için videolara sesli yorum ekliyorum. Ayrıca çeşitli bağlamlar ve ek açıklamalar sunuyorum.

Videolarımda bir hata, eksik veya yanlış bilgi varsa eğer, düzeltmem için bana bildirin lütfen. Bütün videolar, sahiplerinden izin alınarak paylaşılmaktadır. Orijinal sahipleri açıklama kısmında!

description:
🏍️ Thời Cùi Bắp MotoVlog là nơi lưu giữ những hành trình trên khắp các cung đường Việt Nam bằng niềm đam mê xe máy và khát khao khám phá.

Tôi không phải là một tay lái chuyên nghiệp, cũng không sở hữu những chuyến đi xa hoa. Chỉ là một người yêu những con đường, thích cảm giác tự do sau tay lái và mong muốn chia sẻ vẻ đẹp của quê hương qua từng hành trình.

Mỗi chuyến đi là một câu chuyện, mỗi cung đường là một trải nghiệm, và mỗi khoảnh khắc đều mang đến những bài học đáng nhớ. Từ những con đèo quanh co của vùng núi Tây Bắc đến những cung đường ven biển tuyệt đẹp, tất cả đều được ghi lại bằng cảm xúc chân thật nhất.

🌄 Khám phá những cung đường đẹp nhất Việt Nam
🏍️ Hành trình mô tô và phượt bụi
📹 Chia sẻ kinh nghiệm, điểm đến và những khoảnh khắc đáng nhớ
❤️ Kết nối những người cùng đam mê xê dịch

Đi để cảm nhận – Sống để trải nghiệm.

Cảm ơn bạn đã đồng hành cùng Thời Cùi Bắp MotoVlog trên từng cây số. Đừng quên Đăng ký kênh để cùng khám phá những cung đường đẹp nhất Việt Nam

description:
🌍 MOTO WORLD EXPLORER | Solo Motorcycle Adventure
Welcome to Moto World Explorer.
 I’m Matees, a solo rider documenting raw, unscripted motorcycle travel and overlanding expeditions across Southeast Asia and beyond. If you want a real Vietnam motovlog, Thailand travel guide, or adventure riding grit, you’re in the right place. No scripts—just pure moto life.

🗺️ THE JOURNEY SO FAR:

Season 0 | India: Where the moto-trekking began.

Season 1 | Vietnam: The Ha Giang Loop & Mekong Delta.

Season 2 | Thailand: Off-road jungle trails & temples.

Season 3 | Laos: Cross-border journey through the mountains.
🚀 SUBSCRIBE to join the ride. Real roads. Real stories.

description:
Chào mừng các bạn đến với kênh của Phúc Mập ! Tên tôi là Hurley, nhưng người Việt Nam biết tôi là "Phúc Mâp". Mình đã sống ở Việt Nam được 8 năm, gặp gỡ người dân địa phương và đi du lịch đến những địa điểm mới trên khắp Việt Nam và Châu Á. Kênh này là để cho bạn bè và những người theo dõi tôi thấy cuộc sống hàng ngày ở đây tại châu Á. Thưởng thức và cho mình biết những gì bạn nghĩ trong các ý kiến.

Welcome to my channel! My name is Hurley, but the Vietnamese know me as "Phúc Mập". I've lived in Vietnam for the past 8 years, meeting locals and traveling to new places around Vietnam and Asia. This channel is to show my friends and followers the day-to-day life  over here in Asia. Enjoy and let me know what you think in the comments.

description:
Want to experience the most beautiful countries and learn travel tips along the way? 

We create cinematic travel vlogs that take you to breathtaking destinations, alongside informative travel guides to help you plan your own adventure. Whether you're a seasoned explorer or an up-and-coming traveler, join us as we discover hidden gems, uncover local cultures, and experience the magic of our planet. Subscribe for wanderlust inspiration and practical travel knowledge!

How you know if this channel is for you: 
Is traveling a passion of yours?
Have you ever been overwhelmed going to a place you know nothing about? 
Are you struggling to find the best way to explore new places? 
Do you want to see the most beautiful places come alive before you decide to go yourself?
Is travel cinematography something you want to pursue? 

If you answered yes to any of these questions, then welcome to Lauren & Jason!

description:
I've been a content creator all of my life. The first time I made a video about anything was in 1984. I've never stopped filming and editing since then, although the context has changed throughout my career (television, corporate, commercial, documentary, YouTube, etc.). 

Now I have the time and freedom in my life to make the kind of videos that I want to make, which usually involve travel by motorcycle and/or 4x4 van, and life as a the owner of a small vintage motel in Bisbee, Arizona. All of this is made much easier with the support of my incredible partner and muse, Eva.

Join me and I will show you great roads, beautiful destinations and epic campsites. We might learn a little bit about the world around us and have a good drink at the end of the day.

I am just a random Yorkshireman living in Suffolk who loves to ride and sail. A real life look at bikes I ride and described in simple, honest terms without all the numbers and occasionally all the facts. My views are my own and occasionally others. Memories of a life growing up with motorcycles and an older brother recanted and rides out to places of interest. A very general channel with lots of muttering. description:
Welcome to The Motorcycle Wanderer – Your Ultimate Two-Wheeled Travel Companion!

Join me on a journey of freedom, exploration, and adventure as I travel Europe and beyond by motorcycle. Based in the UK, I ride with a spirit of spontaneity—often with just a loose plan and a full tank—seeking out the most scenic roads, hidden gems, and unforgettable moments on two wheels.

This channel is dedicated to motorcycle travel enthusiasts, adventure riders, and anyone who dreams of exploring the world from the saddle. From winding Alpine passes and coastal highways to ferry crossings, gorges, and wild campsites, every ride tells a story.

Whether you’re planning your own motorcycle touring adventure, curious about road trip gear, or just love the idea of discovering new places from the rider’s perspective—The Motorcycle Wanderer is here to inspire and inform.

Hit subscribe and ride along as we explore the world one mile at a time.

description:
Hey there fellow riders and classic car aficionados! Welcome to my corner of the internet where I dive into the world of MGB Roadsters, Aprilias like the Tuono V4 Factory and the RSV Mille R; BSA beauties, and a whole lot more.

I’m a motoring enthusiast with a modest collection of vehicles, passionate about creating new content for fellow enthusiasts to (hopefully) enjoy.

Current vehicles:
 - 1961 BSA Super Rocket
 - 1972 MGB Roadster
 - 2002 Aprillia Mille R
 - 2007 CBR 1000R Fireblade
 - 2022 Aprilia Tuono V4 1100 Factory

Join me on a journey through the pages of automotive history, exploring Classic Cars and heart-pounding Superbikes, including the iconic CBR Fireblade. Need tips on keeping your classic bikes in top-notch shape? Still learning my way through this part, but I’ll share my experiences and the community of subscribers are always eager to provide advice - thanks guys!

Hit subscribe, buckle up, and let's roll into the past and present of these incredible machines!

description:
In 2018, we started exploring the UK and Europe by motorcycles, using a motorhome/ campervan as a base for our travels. Since then, we've explored over 15 countries and had some amazing adventures- and we'd like to share them with you. :) We're sharing some never-before-seen footage of our trips to Norway, Italy, Germany and many other countries, plus all the adventures we're currently planning! 

We also ride on the track, and will share any tips and tricks we pick up along the way. 

So whether you want to have your own motorcycle adventure, or just live vicariously through us, SUBSCRIBE to this channel to get weekly videos to help & inspire you. And if you have a question, don't hesitate to ask! 

Thanks for watching.

description:
Looking for all things motorcycle reviews, rides and adventures? Here, I blend reviews, rides and adventures into my already busy life. Always a glutton for punishment.

A family man, business owner providing production services for the publishing industry, I've always had an avid interest in motorcycles since working with a Moto GP team just after the turn of the millennium. I've work on many motorcycle-related publications and projects too. One career highlight was working with the late Steve Wright – a well-known American motorcycle historian and classic bike restorer who published the odd book or two. He restored Steve McQueen's motorcycles too.

So join me as a ride my life into the future. Who knows what the story will unfold. All you need to is subscribe, hit that bell as we have plenty of vids to come.

description:
I'm Vanessa Ruck, aka The Girl On A Bike – motorcycle rider, rally racer, adventurer and TEDx award-winning motivational speaker. I share the raw, unfiltered reality of life on two wheels: racing, recovery, resilience, travel and motherhood in motorsport. No fake perfection—just truth.

After a life-changing accident, I live with chronic pain but refuse to let it hold me back. I’ve ridden in over 33 countries and raced some of the world’s toughest events including the original Dakar.

You’ll find motorcycle rally and enduro content, adventure bike travel, mental health, bike maintenance, fitness after injury, and life as a biker mum.

Proud moments:
1st place & first British woman to finish Africa Eco Race (original Dakar)
Red Bull Romaniacs finished
Free Schools Workshops
Raced Qatar Int. Baja, Rallye du Maroc & British Extreme
Tunisia Desert Challenge as #1 & only female

📧 hello@thegirlonabike.com
👇 Subscribe & join the ride!

description:
Hei, I’m Finn, a motorcycle filmmaker and photographer. Join me on thrilling road trips and adventures as I explore the world on two wheels, capturing every moment. From mountain passes on to hidden gems in various countries, you'll experience exciting rides and a bit of light comedy along the way. Grab a chair, take a look at my journeys, and I dare you to hit the road yourself—it’s all about fun and adventure.

Countries I’ve explored: Austria, Argentina, Belgium, Bolivia, Chile, England, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, India, Indonesia, Italy, Japan, Portugal, Spain, Switzerland, Slovenia, Wales, Vietnam.

Motorbikes I’ve owned: KTM 690 Duke III, KTM 990 Superduke R, KTM 450 EXC Factory, MV Agusta F4RR, Honda CX500.

Motorbikes I've riden on trips: BMW G650GS/F750GS/F800GS/R1200GS, Honda XR250 & XL700V Transalp, Kawasaki KLR650, Triumph Speed Triple 1050, Royal Enfield Bullet 500 & Classic.

Filmed on GoPro Hero 3 & 6 Black Editions and Panasonic Lumix G6 & GH5.

description:
Здравейте! Казвам се Стефан и съм авантюрист по природа. Живея, за да пътувам и да приключенствам с мотора – 365 дни в годината, през всички сезони. Това е моето лекарство и бягство от ежедневието.

В този канал ще видите един реален човек, без маски и илюзии. Ще видите много пътешествия, маршрути, любими продукти и моята философия за живота. 

Надявам се тук да си прекарате страхотно и ако съм ви вдъхновил да се качите на мотор и да тръгнете към собственото си приключение – ще съм истински щастлив.

Ако всичко това резонира с вас, абонирайте се и кажете едно здрасти! :)

-

Hello! I’m Stefan, an adventurer by nature. I live to travel and explore the world on my motorcycle—365 days a year, in all seasons. This is my medicine and my escape.

Here you’ll see the real me—no masks, no illusions. Journeys, routes, favorite gear, and my philosophy on life.

If all this resonates with you, subscribe and say hello! :)

description:
⚠️ DEJ SUBA! ⬇️👍

Cześć! Ja jestem Urso Branco, a Ty jesteś na kanale Niedźwiedź. Jest to kanał dla początkujących motocyklistów i początkujących podróżników.
Z wykształcenia jestem pedagogiem a z zawodu instruktorem nauki jazdy. Na tym kanale chcę Ci pokazać jak kupić swój pierwszy motocykl, jak go serwisować i przygotować do podróży a także jak doskonalić swoje umiejętności jazdy motocyklem.
Ponad to, chcę Ci pokazać ciekawe miejsca warte odwiedzenia na motocyklu w czasie wycieczek jednodniowych jak i wielodniowych wypraw.
Zasubskrybuj mój kanał, jeśli dopiero zamierzasz zrobić prawo jazdy na motocykl, jesteś w trakcie kursu lub właśnie zdałeś egzamin państwowy. Na tym kanale uzyskasz informacje, których nikt Ci nie przekaże trakcie szkolenia!
Zasubskrybuj mój kanał, jeśli uważasz, że zawsze można nauczyć się czegoś nowego a nieustanny rozwój motocyklisty prowadzi do jego bezpieczeństwa!
Pozdrawiam Grzegorz Urso Branco Fita!

description:
Bienvenido a mi canal de motovlogs y viajes en moto por México 🏍🔥 Aquí vivirás la aventura sobre dos ruedas, con rutas increíbles, viajes en motocicleta, motocamping, risas y experiencias únicas junto a mi novia y mi moto “La Alebrijosa”.

Compartimos rutas en moto por pueblos mágicos, motovlogs urbanos, entregas en moto, tutoriales de accesorios para motociclistas, reseñas de cascos, intercomunicadores, llantas y cámaras de acción, todo con un toque cómico, aventurero y fresco.

Si te apasiona viajar en motocicleta, descubrir nuevos lugares y vivir la vida biker, este canal es para ti.
Suscríbete y únete a la banda motera más chida de YouTube 🤟🇲🇽

description:
After leaving active duty as a U.S. Navy JAG attorney, I decided to follow my passion for adventure travel, motorcycle trips, sailing, filmmaking and creative storytelling. My art form is making these videos. My inspirations are people like Anthony Bourdain, Werner Herzog and Stanley Kubrick who had/have a great knack for storytelling and transporting viewers through their writing and filmmaking. Join me in exploring life's adventures through my frequent vlogs. 

"Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all."  - Helen Keller

Subscribe to join the adventure. Thanks for watching!

My Patreon page: https://www.patreon.com/JoshPost

Follow on Instagram: @mrjoshpost

description:
Bienvenido a Diario de un Motero, un espacio donde cada kilómetro se convierte en una historia.
Aquí encontrarás viajes en moto, paisajes increíbles, ciudades llenas de vida y un estilo relajado donde hablo contigo como si fuéramos rodando juntos.

Comparto mis recorridos por diferentes lugares, curiosidades de la ruta, experiencias reales, tips, anécdotas y un toque de humor motero. Si te gusta viajar, conocer nuevos rincones y disfrutar la carretera sin prisa, este es tu lugar.

Súbete conmigo, ponte cómodo y rodemos.
Este es el diario de un motero… contado desde la moto.

description:
En Pasto Motovlog te invito a recorrer mi ciudad sobre dos ruedas 🏍️, mezclando cultura motera, aprendizaje vial y experiencias reales de camino. 🎥
Entre calles, barrios y lugares llenos de historia, descubrirás la esencia de Pasto, su gente y sus paisajes únicos. 🌄
Cada ruta es una oportunidad para disfrutar, reflexionar y sentir orgullo de nuestra tierra nariñense. 🌍✨

Si te gusta viajar, conocer y aprender con cada kilómetro, este canal es para ti.
🔔 Suscríbete y acompáñame en cada recorrido lleno de historia, aventura y conciencia vial. 🌍

From advising direction and support for cross-marketing, social media and search optimization, to providing production facilities and funding and cultivating new IPs, VS MEDIA enable aspiring influencers by providing them professional tools to develop, market and monetize their original content.

The company continues to grow internationally from Hong Kong, Taiwan, Singapore, and beyond.

description:
Welcome to Adventure Bike Rider, the UK's largest community of adventure bikers. Based in Stratford-upon-Avon, we started as a print magazine 2010 and have since become a leading voice on all things motorbike travel worldwide. 

We aim to inspire, entertain, and inform you with travel focused content and expert knowledge. Join us as we review adventure, touring, and dual-sport bikes, cover the latest bike news, test gear, interview legends of the adventure riding community, share skills and handy how-to's, and otherwise discuss anything related to our passion.

We also host Europe's largest adventure biking festival every year at Ragley Hall, Warwickshire. Watch all the highlights from the event here which draws over 10,000 riders to celebrate travelling the world on two-wheels.

Visit www.adventurebikerider.com to access our online magazine.
Head to https://www.abrfestival.com/ to discover more about ABR Festival, the greatest celebration of adventure biking.

Have Bike Will Travel.

description: This Channel is dedicated to Christian bikers and the love of motorcycles and faith. I aim to motivate and support people to get on a motorcycle and also help them on life's path. This includes tutorials on everything in relation to motorcycles, how to ride safely and to get a motorcycle licence in the UK. The aim of my Christian motovlogging extends beyond simply combining faith and motorcycles; it seeks to create a unique and impactful online presence that glorifies God and serves the wider community. At its core, the goal is to authentically integrate Christian values and perspectives into the everyday experience of riding.This Channel also seeks to communicate sound Bible Doctrine and build a firm Biblical foundational base for Christians today. I discuss theology that formulates an orderly, rational, and coherent account of the doctrines of the Christian faith. I address issues such as what the Bible teaches about certain topics or what is true about God and his universe.

description:
I am Scott Thomas South, a disabled American Army veteran from Kansas City, KS, who embarked on a life-changing journey to Thailand in October 2015 for health reasons. Since then, I have immersed myself in the vibrant culture of Thailand, finding purpose and connection.

Choosing Thailand for its tropical climate, I have been a full-time resident since 2015, only returning to the States for occasional vacations. Married to a Thai lady, he navigates life with a Non-O Family visa, making Thailand my home away from home.

I have taught English here for six years on a very part time basis. From high school to the Royal Thai Military Academy, teaching English has been a great joy. Hense the name of the channel "Teacher Thomas Thailand"

Update: I am now living in Chanthaburi City Thailand as of Feb 1st 2025

Fueling my passion for sharing the Thai experience, i created a YouTube channel, documenting my life as an expat.

description:
Hi my name name is Matthew.  I ride Adventure Motorcycles across some of the most remote places in the world.   

If you like adventure, motorcycles and coffee then I think you will like what my videos are about. I am of Greek heritage so there is lots of passion in what I do! 

I ride also for a purpose, to fight human trafficking.

Ride Against Human Trafficking

There are more slaves today than any other time in history. From the Southern border of the United States to the Sahara desert the problem is Global and the problem is growing.

MVX is committed to changing the picture and changing the narrative. We want to end it.  This is a fight everyone needs to engage in and become informed about. 

We are organizing fundraising to end human trafficking and deliver relief services for those who are in need.

Partner with us to create change! 

Subscribe if you like to support us in this journey or if you simply love motorcycles, travel adventures, and coffee.

description:
This channel is a personal journal of my life, travels, and the experiences that shape me.

I document real adventures around the world.  mostly on motorcycles and in cars, from riding and driving across the UK to exploring new countries on two wheels and four. For me, riding and driving aren’t just hobbies, they’re how I clear my head, push myself, and feel free.

You’ll find motorcycle rides, car journeys, road trips, travel vlogs, and honest reviews of bikes, cars, gear, and products I actually use. Along the way, I also share lifestyle content, personal growth, and new challenges as I try to enjoy life more intentionally and step outside my comfort zone.

This isn’t about perfection or showing off.  it’s about movement, progress, freedom, and making the most of the time we have. If you’re into motorcycles, cars, travel, and real-life journeys, you’re welcome to ride along.

description: Moto On Three is where adventure meets two wheels. With over 30 years of outdoor exploration, I bring together ultralight camping, survival skills, and dual sport motorcycle riding to create the ultimate minimalist adventure experience. This channel is all about going farther with less—packing smart, riding hard, and discovering wild places that most people will never see. You’ll find gear reviews, motorcycle camping tips, trail riding adventures, survival strategies, and practical lessons learned from years of testing the limits outdoors. Whether you’re new to ADV riding or a seasoned explorer, Moto On Three will inspire you to simplify your setup, master your skills, and chase unforgettable journeys. Join me as I ride beyond the pavement, share real-world motorcycle adventures, and prove that less gear can mean more freedom.

description:
Bicycle Touring Pro is the world’s most popular how-to bicycle touring website and information source. You’ve come to the right place if you want to learn how to conduct your own incredible cycling adventures anywhere in the world. 

Bicycle Touring Pro is a website dedicated to helping people of all ages, incomes and backgrounds get their start in the wonderful world of bicycle touring. 

What started as a small online resource for how to plan, prepare for, and execute a self-supported bicycle tour has quickly grown into the most recognized name in the bicycle touring world. Since its creation in late 2007, Bicycle Touring Pro has inspired thousands of people and given them the confidence and resources needed to conduct the bicycle tour of their dreams!

Content created by the Bicycle Touring Pro - Darren Alff.

description: The Motorcycle Cannonball is the most difficult antique endurance run in the world. Started in 2010 the event takes place every other year and features over 100 antique motorcycles that are usually 100 years and older.  The coast-to-coast endurance run is a true test of Man vs. Machine and has been dubbed the hardest antique motorcycle event in the world.  Follow along as we show you what the riders endure during this grueling and rewarding event.

description:
A motorcycle and a stubborn mind. Sometimes all that takes to make dreams come true. 

Hi, I’m Krikko! 🏍️

I’ve ridden solo from Sweden to Nepal, and now I’m back home, ready for a new chapter of adventures.

I live for motorcycles, the great outdoors, and the thrill of exploring nature, camping and chasing freedom on two wheels.

I want to inspire all of you to step out of your comfort zones, face new challenges and pursue your dreams. Life's greatest rewards lie just outside your comfort zone.

Join me on my next journey, who knows where the road will take us, but I promise it’ll be epic. 
Subscribe and come along for the ride!

Let the Adventure Continue

Find me on my other channels ❤️

A  solo female motorcycle travel channel -on and off road - by Amanda Zito. Expect episodic road trip series, and helpful stand alone videos about adventure travel & camping. 

Amanda Zito was born and raised in Montana. She moved to Portland, OR in 2010 to attend PNCA where she earned a BFA in Illustration.

description:
Ocean life, surfing, swimming and coastal adventures from Durban, South Africa 🇿🇦

I’m Mike Frew — surfer, swimmer and ocean enthusiast sharing real experiences from the water.

Based in Durban on South Africa’s east coast, this channel captures life in KwaZulu-Natal, from heavy surf and glassy mornings to dolphins, sardine runs, pool and open water swimming, surf fitness, sailing and major weather events.

You’ll find:

• Surfing in Durban and around South Africa
• Dolphins, marine life and ocean encounters
• Pool and open water swimming, surf fitness and training
• GoPro POV sessions in real conditions
• Floods, storms and rare coastal events
• South African surf culture and community

Whether it’s a perfect offshore morning, a cyclone swell, dolphins or a major weather event, the goal is simple: document the ocean as it really is.

Thanks for following along 🤙

Mike Frew | Frewbru

Durban Surfing, SA Surfing, KZN Waves, Open Water Swimming, Pool Swimming, Dolphins, Coastal Weather

description:
Powered and Sponsored by HK Army Paintball, PBgearauctions.com, Empire Paintball, ANSgear.com, Zephyr Paintball, and Ultimate Paintball!

Welcome to Katana Paintball! A local YouTube channel of in-game recordings of both woodsball and speedball, reviews, comparisons, and more about the concept of Paintball. We play paintball AND airsoft in Central Ohio and surrounding regions. We use a GoPro Hero 3 Silver Edition and an HD Hero Original. We play at Splatter Park, XCape, and are willing to try new places.

Katana Paintball consists of Ryan Reichow and Jack Riordan. Ryan uses a 2013 Proto Reflex Rail with an Empire Halo Too and Empire 68/4500 Tank. Jack uses a DLX Luxe 1.5 with a Virtue Spire and a Crossfire 70/4500 Tank. 

Hope you enjoy our channel! If you have any questions or comments, please PM us or comment on any of our videos. Thanks for viewing, and please subscribe!

Welcome to Shadowed Camps — a channel dedicated to the darkest corners of the outdoors.
Here, you’ll find real camping encounters that went horribly wrong, chilling wilderness moments caught on camera, and outdoor stories that blur the line between the explainable and the unknown.

Your journey into the shadows starts now. 🌙

description:
Welcome! Ian Walsh is an award and major event winning professional surfer who enjoys scaring the sh!t out of himself in 50-70 foot surf. This also creates a unique opportunity to push himself. Which is what he is really after. 

But let's get to the real reason you're here... KITCHEN CAPTAIN! 

On this channel, you're going to be thoroughly entertained while learning how to cook at home. Weekly cooking episodes will be served up and there might be a sprinkle or two of high-quality surfing videos. This is not a Michelin star chef show. This is the everyman cooking show in your own kitchen. If Ian can make it, then so can you. Cooking doesn't need to be hard, but it does need to taste good. There will be mistakes, there will be laughs, and there will be some damn good recipes learned! Put your seatbelt on, hit that SUBSCRIBE button, and buckle up! Let's go!

description:
¿Tienes ganas de hacer surf o bodyboard? aquí encontrarás un canal lleno de surfing y sobre todo bodyboard. Me apasiona viajar por las costas, vivir aventuras, hacer nuevos viajes, explorar olas diferentes y descubrir lugares únicos para surfear.

En este canal comparto mis sesiones de surf y bodyboard, desde las playas de Canarias hasta spots alrededor del mundo. Mi objetivo es que disfrutes de cada momento de surfing, que te motives a salir al agua y que juntos vivamos nuevas aventuras en cada vídeo.

Aquí verás viajes de surfing, trucos para mantener tu bodyboard, experiencias de surfing, y sobre todo, la magia de explorar nuevas olas y descubrir playas increíbles.

🏄​El peor baño es el que no te das🏄​
 
Así que acompáñame en este canal de surf, bodyboard, aventuras, viajes, ganas de explorar y pasión por descubrir el océano.

description:
🌊 4Board Argentina: Surf, Wood & Lifestyle 🪚
¡Bienvenidos! Somos una familia apasionada por el mar y la carpintería. En este canal compartimos nuestro estilo de vida: desde sesiones de surf en la costa argentina hasta el proceso de transformar madera en objetos con alma.

¿Qué verás en nuestro canal?

Surf Trips: Recorremos los mejores points de Argentina. Desde el norte de Mardel (Cardiel, El Barco) y Playa Grande (Biología, Yacht), hasta el sur (La Paloma, Honu Beach, Chapadmalal, Acantilados y Miramar).

Diseño y Carpintería: El detrás de escena de nuestros racks artesanales para Surf, Snow, Skate y más. Además, nuestra línea de muebles y bancos estilo californiano.

Unimos la pasión por el agua y la nobleza de la madera para equipar tu hogar y tus sesiones. 🤙

Contacto: 🌐 Web: www.4board.com.ar 📩 Email: 4boardarg@gmail.com 📞 WhatsApp: 223 5215710 📍 Mar del Plata, Argentina.

¡Suscribite y acompañanos en la próxima ola!

description:
New paddling inspiration, tip, trips or technique 4K videos added regularly.

Watch Dave, Ed and Moo on their kayaking, canoe and SUP adventures. It's all about having fun on the water.

Dave has kayaked since the 80s whereas Ed and Moo are building their paddling confidence and skills.

Dave is a Paddlesport Instructor and a trainee Kayak Coach. He promotes safe paddling and runs engaging and fun paddlesport sessions for participants across the UK.

We make donations to the British Heart Foundation (BHF). It's a charity very close to Dave's heart (pun intended).

Please do like, comment and subscribe - we LOVE engaging with you.

Thanks for watching and supporting the channel.

**PADDLESPORTS CAN BE DANGEROUS **

Please follow ALL safety and paddling guidelines before starting out. The advice on this channel is given in good faith and must be assessed by YOU to be suitable for YOUR needs.

description:
We just want to spend more time outdoors...It seems other people want this too...so we thought we'd help with that.

We are Bevan and Jill, a husband and wife team originally from South Africa but currently living in Taiwan.

Growing up in South Africa almost certainly means a life of outdoor activity, and that was definitely the case for both of us.

These days we seek to inspire and teach others how to spend more time outdoors and maximize those precious moments in the natural world through detailed adventure guides; tips, tricks and how-to articles as well as some adventure stories from ourselves and others who have inspired us.

So if you're keen to stray along the way with us, subscribe to our channel for regular videos, or better still, join our adventure mailing list for weekly adventure content here: https://www.strayalongtheway.com/email-subscribe/

description:
Bienvenidos a Glass Venezuela.

Este canal está dedicado a mostrar, documentar y apoyar el surf venezolano a través del seguimiento de nuestros atletas, la cobertura de competencias, historias de viaje y producciones audiovisuales originales.

Nuestra misión es acompañar el recorrido de los surfistas venezolanos, desde las nuevas promesas hasta los atletas que representan al país en escenarios internacionales, destacando sus logros, desafíos y el esfuerzo que hay detrás de cada resultado.

Además de la cobertura de eventos y la actualidad del surf nacional, producimos contenidos documentales y cinematográficos que exploran las personas, los lugares y las historias que dan vida al surf en Venezuela.

Ya sea un campeonato nacional, un viaje en busca de olas o la historia de un atleta persiguiendo sus sueños, Glass Venezuela estará allí para contarlo.

Surf. Cultura. Historias. Venezuela.

Anthony Krige

description:
Professional bodyboarder. Filmmaker. Wave hunter.

I travel the world in search of pumping surf, from ice cold Atlantic slabs in Cape Town to warm, heavy reef passes in the tropics. This channel documents the pursuit of proper swell. Not just the highlight waves, but the early mornings, long strike missions, shifting forecasts, heavy wipeouts and the sessions that make it all worth it.

Here, performance meets storytelling. Expect powerful beach breaks, hollow slabs, technical bodyboarding, raw ocean energy and high end cinematic edits that capture the feeling of each location. Some trips score. Some humble you. Every mission adds to the story.

This is about pushing limits, chasing conditions and documenting the craft with intention.

New edits dropping regularly.

description:
The variety of the surfing experience is far reaching and constantly evolving. Real Surf Stories represents that with fresh content that will constantly continue to redefine the limits of surf content creation.
From surf travel, legends, 80's surfing, 70's surfing, 90's surfing, asp, wct, ips, every surfer will love our content from Australia, Hawaii, California, Bali, Indonesia, Peru, Panama, Dominican Republic, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, and worldwide. From Gerry Lopez to Kelly Slater, to Gabriel Medina, we filmed them all and our stories from the Pipeline Masters, Sunset Beach, Gold Coast, Mavericks, Jaws, Puerto Escondido and beyond. All aspects of surfing, like longboards, kitesurfing, foil surfing, skimboarding and body surfing, we love it all. To surf all waves, enjoy the beach, ocean, all surfboards, with surfing tips, surf lessons, how to surf, surf lifestyle, surf culture, beginner surfer, surf competition, surf spots, surf training...it's all part of the surfing experience.

We have attractive surf camps in unique, bucket-list locations around the world, designed to cater to surfers of all skill levels and adventure requirements. description:
82% of my viewers don't realize they don't subscribe, please double check, thank you!! 

I was sad and stuck in the corporate world, when I quit that to start an online dance clothing business with my mom. After years of growing the revenue but struggling to make enough profit to support myself I had to move back in with my parents. It was at this point I realized I want to create a business I was passionate about, and I took all the lessons learned and created my first +$100K/year product, and more importantly I loved my business, my life and I started enjoying the journey.

Since then I've taught this to +4,000 students and made +12.3M in sales.

I want to give you what I wish I would have known when I first started:  

1. Data-driven methods find winning products. 

2. A proven A-Z launch blueprint and growth hacks. 

3. Talking to reals sellers and showing you both the wins and losses. 

Always easy, no experience needed. Thanks for joining!

description:
There is a cure for boredom. It's found in progression.

August 28, 2017. As I sat at my desk in an office cubicle staring at a computer screen, two days after my 35th birthday, I realized I'd been wasting my youth. From that day forward, I decided to spend every minute possible doing the things I'm most passionate about. I decided to film & share them with you. Snowboarding, skateboarding, & getting the heart rate up outdoors are my passions. In 2018 I left my old life behind. I quit my corporate job & moved from the flat hills of Maryland to the mountains of Utah with my amazing wife to ride the "greatest snow on earth", filming the whole life-changing journey for YOU. 

I strongly believe that YOU are never too old, too young, or too busy to pursue the things you're passionate about. You don't have to be the best at what you do, just do YOUR BEST at what you love.

Boredom dies when we chase progression. So... What are you chasing?

-Dan

description:
I'm Steven, another YouTube backpacker with a mild obsession for all things gear-related. On this channel, I delve into the world of backpacking gear, offering invaluable insights, tips, and tricks. Whether you're looking for beginner backpacker tips, tests on the newest cutting-edge technology, ultralight setups, or more traditional load-outs, I've got you covered. Join me as I put real gear to the test, recount epic trips, and share what it’s really like to make a career from YouTube.

A bit about me: I'm a 40-year-old, happily married father of four. I started YouTubing full-time in November 2021 to share my love for the great outdoors, helping people get out and explore the outdoors just as much as I do. If you ever have questions or thoughts, don't hesitate to reach out. You can drop a comment on any of my videos, or send an email to info@mylifeoutdoors.com.

Join my email list for exclusive content about gear, YouTube success, monthly newsletters, and more. Link Below

description:
Salut … Je suis Bastien LAB alias  ThesnowAddict  ou encore MaitreGlissou , et je te souhaite la bienvenue sur ma Chaîne YouTube ! 

Kitesurfeur Pro à la retraite , je me suis aujourd’hui reconverti après 15 ans de Kitesurf à travers le monde,  en rideur Multi-sports et multi-glisses !!! Je suis addict des Sports Outdoor en général ! Qu'ils se pratiquent dans l'eau, sur la neige , en montagne ou dans les airs.

Au quotidien je pratique un peu tous les sports #outdoor et de #glisse comme le #surf , le #kitesurf , le #foil  le #ski . Le reste  du temps ( et il en reste encore beaucoup rassure-toi ) je m’applique à t’aider à progresser dans ton ou tes sport(s)  #glisse favori(s) via cette chaîne YouTube ou à vivre de ta passion , en t'enseignant la méthode qui me permet de glisser quand bon me semble et ou bon me semble ....

Alors si tu veux apprendre, progresser, performer, rider, glisser ... un réflexe : t'abonner !  Rejoins la famille LAB et vis tes rêves éveillé !
