description:
MurphyTravels is dedicated to outdoor exploration, adventure, and pushing personal limits in wild places. I document my journey through canyons, mountains, forests, deserts, and coastlines — chasing the thrill of real adventure through hiking, canyoneering, backpacking, cliff jumping, trail running, snowboarding, snorkeling, and soaking in remote natural hot springs.

From narrow slot canyons in Utah and volcanic peaks in Hawaii to the beaches of Costa Rica and glaciers in Alaska, I capture the most memorable moments from my outdoor adventures — all filmed to inspire others to explore more and go farther.

Subscribe to my YouTube channel for immersive outdoor content, detailed trip reports, and real-world inspiration to get outside.

Disclaimer: Many activities featured on this channel involve risk. Always use proper gear, take precautions, and know your limits.

description:
My name is Andreas Schubert, I live in Whistler BC, and spend all of my time snowboarding the mountains and making videos documenting the experience.
My videos include daily vlogging of riding my home mountains (Whistler Blackcomb), as well as traveling to other mountains, resorts and countries. In addition I make product review videos that help people shop for snowboarding gear and accessories. 
My videos often include my circle of friends here in Whistler, including Kevin Peirce from Snowboard Pro Camp, Chris Eyres, and TJ Kern of Board Archive. We often collaborate our efforts together, helping one another film and create content.

I've spent my entire adult life working in ski and snowboard shops, and currently still am doing so, at Comor Sports in Whistler BC. My time spent working in shops has helped me to amass extensive amounts of knowledge and understanding in the sport and its equipment. I use this knowledge to teach others about the sport and to review various products.

description:

Videos I make are focused on:
- freeride vlogs with tips/ advice thrown in along the way
- snowboard gear videos (boards, bindings and boots of course plus apparel, back country gear etc)

- backcountry hikes - huge increase in popularity this season and the first I have owned my setup
- live chat Q&A's

Hope you come along on the journey :)

My goal on YouTube is to take this dream one step further and build an audience of people who have similar interests to me. description:
Just a medical student super psyched on climbing and adventuring.

WARNING: These videos are NOT meant to be educational in any way. It is imperative that you seek education from a qualified professional before attempting any sort of climbing or ropework. 

A note on vulgarity: These videos are real. Emotion and fear in rock climbing is a real thing. Sometimes I say vulgarities and yell at myself to get hyped up to do a sequence. These words are not meant to be offensive or aimed at any specific group other than myself. I want these videos to be candid and feel real, therefore there isn't bleeps or filters. If you are offended by vulgar language, then watch the videos without volume, then try climbing a runout tips crack at your limit without cursing....

description:
Help support me https://www.patreon.com/cw/johnoutdoorvideos

John OutdoorVideos is a first-person POV climbing and outdoor adventure channel featuring real rock climbing from the climber’s perspective. Videos include helmet-cam and GoPro-style footage, trad climbing, sport climbing, route beta, gear placements, crux sequences, approaches, exposure, falls, and full-route experiences.

I’ve climbed and filmed areas including Red River Gorge, Muir Valley, Shelf Road, Clear Creek Canyon, Boulder Canyon, Big Cottonwood Canyon, Mt. Nemo, Rattlesnake Point, New River Gorge, Hawksbill Mountain, the Gunks, Red Rocks, Kolob Canyon, Penitente Canyon, Sitting Bull Falls, Banff, Squamish, and Estes Park.

Subscribe for first-person POV rock climbing, route walkthroughs, outdoor trips, classic climbing destinations, and real adventures from the sharp end.

description:
I’m a guy that loves climbing rocks (and usually the hard way)!

This project, “First Person Beta”, aims to deliver the climbing adventure as close to a human perspective as I can perform. I place a large value on the raw experience. This kind of footage has offered me technical beta, kept the psyche high and (maybe most importantly for myself) made the seemingly daunting accessible and possible. Simply put, this kind of footage has expanded my climbing universe.

I hope you can take away just as much!

description:
At Recreational Equipment, Inc. (REI), we love to get outside and play, and we know first-hand the importance of quality outdoor gear. We stand behind all our products with a 100% satisfaction guarantee, and we design our own line of award-winning REI brand gear and clothing. Whether you're new to outdoor adventure or a seasoned pro, we gladly share our enthusiasm for our products—and the trails, slopes and waterways where we play.

Each year, REI donates millions of dollars to support conservation efforts nationwide and sends dedicated teams of volunteers—members, customers and REI employees—to build trails, clean up beaches, restore local habitats and more.... 

REI's passion for the outdoors runs deep. Our core purpose is to inspire, educate and outfit people for a lifetime of outdoor adventure and stewardship.  Become a member today and get outside!

description:
Welcome to JetSetYourself, your home for raw, technical, and immersive outdoor adventure.

If you’re passionate about pushing limits in the wild, you’re in the right place. We specialize in deep dives into Via Ferrata climbing and Overlanding expeditions, focusing on the Alps, Carpathians, Balkans and beyond.

What to Expect:
Via Ferrata Mastery: Detailed route guides, technical gear reviews, and safety-first tutorials to help you conquer the cables.
Overlanding Reality: Authentic vehicle-based travel, off-road builds (DusterHouse), and lessons learned from the road.
Gear & Tech: Honest reviews of the cameras, climbing kits, and camping gear we use to document the edge of the world.
From technical breakdowns of overhangs to the psychological side of mountain fear, we believe in showing the full experience: mistakes and all.

Explore. Learn. JetSetYourself.

Subscribe for weekly adventures and gear insights!

description:
I don't ride a mountain bike, I ride the mountains on a bike. 

For me, mountain biking is a way to explore the high country with a true pioneer mindset, venturing where almost no one goes on two wheels, bordering on rock climbing or even mountaineering.

This isn’t a downhill channel. You won’t see tricks or flat-out, Mach-3 descents. This is pure ride in the mountains, often closer to alpine adventure.

I don’t have any support crew or film team. I usually ride solo or with one partner, and we capture everything ourselves, however we can in this kind of terrain. I do all the editing myself. My goal is to create immersive, high-quality films that bring you along with us and make you feel the intense emotions we experience up there.

I hope this 100% outdoor and adventure-driven channel gives you a true escape!

description: Hello everyone, and welcome to my personal video channel called "Underwater Ireland". True to its name, it is mostly dedicated to the underwater life of Ireland, including fishing. I also make environmental films and videos because that is directly linked to wild life. I have done a lot of work for television in the past, both in Ireland and worldwide. I film and edit everything entirely by myself, and because most of my videos show wildlife in its natural habitat, you won't see me much. I am not a vlogger, nor a gamer, and fish don't talk :) I hold full author's rights to all the footage and ready videos so, if you would like to use something for your own projects - please contact me first. Right now, I am not making any profit at all, I have only expenses, so if you would like to support this project - here is the link: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/UnderwaterIreland

description:
Vertical Blue is the most prestigious and longest running annual event in the sport of Freediving. During the last 10 years, more world records have been set in this competition than almost all other events combined!
The event takes place in Dean’s Blue Hole, the deepest accessible blue hole in the world, and a marvel of the seas. It is a 200 meter deep limestone shaft in the corner of an idyllic Caribbean lagoon, on Long Island, Bahamas.
The event was founded in 2008 by World Champion freediver William Trubridge. 
Since then it has grown every year, and in the 2018 edition there were no less than 10 world records set, including riveting battles between the top male and female freedivers to be crowned the king and queen of the depths at the end of the event.
Live footage filmed by Diveye was watched daily by over 2 million viewers around the world.

description:
Hello! I’m a Science Presenter & Producer who has been writing and hosting science content for 20+ years on TV, Radio, YouTube, Podcast, & Stage.

I’ve made a range of programmes: from ​investigative documentaries on TV, Radio & Podcast; to ambitious interactive live shows for families on YouTube; to eye-catching experiments on live TV (I got to be the science guy on Blue Peter and Sunday Brunch for 5 years which was amazing!).

Right now I write & host a weekly BBC Radio 4 show & podcast called "Sliced Bread” where I investigate the bold claims made by promising sounding 'wonder products', give keynotes on my science adventures (I just returned from a trip to the Amazon Rainforest!), and I get to host some really fun events and awards. 

I’m a scientist by training (I graduated with a first in Natural Sciences from Cambridge University) and also run a digital-first production studio sciencemedia.studio that helps brands, research groups & charities tell their science stories!

description:
Sara Campbell is a top female freediver with four World Records and a personal best (PB) of 104m in Constant Weight. She is the founder and creator of Discover Your Depths, a yogic-based freediving education programme. She teaches Kundalini Yoga, and runs classes and retreats as well as the KRI Level 1 international teacher training programme on Sinai.

She is the former World Record holder in free immersion (FIM) (diving to a depth of 81m), constant weight (CWT) (96m) and constant without fins (CNF) (56m) and World Champion in Constant Weight (2007).

description:
Hello!

I love the outdoors and hope to share some of my favourite leisure activities. The majority of content will revolve around fishing (catch n cooks, camping, rock fishing, estuary fishing, diving/spearfishing and more) along with the occasional bodyboard and surfing video. You might even see my dog Mishka, she is a mix breed between an Alaskan Malamute & Husky (Alusky)! 

I am also happy to hear from my audience, if you would like to see a certain video or have any suggestions, leave a comment down below on any video and I will get back to you. I will try to upload every Monday or Wednesday depending on what videos I scheduled for that week.

Aside from my passion of the outdoors, I also enjoy film, acting and the creative arts. Which is why I started this channel, as it allows me to incorporate a large number of my interests. Anyway enough talking from me, thanks for stopping by and I can't wait to see what the future holds for us all!

George.

description:
小笠原諸島の母島観光に参考になる動画をアップしています。
動画構成は離島暮らし、料理、釣り(ジギング、餌釣り、見釣り)などです。
普段はお食事処めぐろでマスター兼シェフをしている為、簡単レシピや本格的な料理の作り方などの
ハウツー系動画も多いです。

料理好きや旅行好きな人にお役に立てれば幸いです。

小笠原諸島に来るには竹芝から出ている船
おがさわら丸で24時間かけて父島
母島は更に船を乗り換えて
ははじま丸で2時間
乗り換えの待ち時間合わせると27時間かかります。
時間をかけて観光で来る皆様は小笠原諸島の現地情報を
少しでも先に知っておけば計画立てやすいかと思います。
少しでも母島の魅力を感じてくれたら嬉しいです。


プロフィール
小笠原諸島の母島育ち
高校から内地に出て料理学校に入学
服部栄養専門学校を卒業後、内地で料理人10年程過ごして
故郷の母島に戻りシェフをやっています。

好きな事 食べること、料理、釣り
小さい時から美味しいものを食べたい欲求が強く
自分で料理をする様になりました。

好きなYouTubeチャンネル
/谷やん谷崎鷹人さん

料理研究家リュウジのバズレシピさん
ロシアン佐藤『おなかがすいたらMONSTER!』さん
はいじぃ迷作劇場さん

2019年12月1日より個人店舗としてお食事処めぐろオープン。
名前は母島にしかいない鳥のハハジマメグロから持ってきて
母島にしかない特別なお店になれるようにと、この店名に致しました。

description:
The International Association for the Development of Apnea (AIDA) was founded in 1992 “by Freedivers, for Freedivers”, to organize the worldwide community and gain recognition for the emerging sport of freediving. 

As the symbol of freediving, AIDA has developed a core set of values to guide the sport as it evolves in a rapidly growing market: 

•Safety - through ongoing research, standardization, and education. 
•Fairness - lead by consistent evaluation of all athletic performances in the international competition circuit and followed at all the levels of the organization.
•Accessibility - through its structure of National representatives that ensure proximity and affordability in all corners of the world.

AIDA was developed as an umbrella organization to cover all aspects of the sport and the synergies between competition, education and community are the foundation of its uniqueness — an association dedicated to “All Freediving and Nothing but Freediving”.

description:
Welcome to my Jamaica WildLife Channel!
 
Where I take you on an adventure free diving and spear fishing in our clear waters and feature wild life from our lush forests all while exploring the wonders of Jamaica.

I am committed to providing exciting and authentic wildlife HD quality videos.
Join me on my next adventure and please subscribe and share my channel.
 
I publish full length videos twice a month – I have a full time job but go out to fish, dive, explore and capture it all on film as often as I can because it’s what I love to do!
 
Thank you for all the support!
 
One love -  the only and only String Bean / Kamar

description:
Welcome to the home for sleep sounds, ambiences, meditation, study sounds and relaxation.

I create audio soundscapes made by using field recordings I record myself and sound effects I create myself, partnered with some stock and public domain audio. I use Logic Pro to mix, master and shape the sound, to build a convincing audio world. There is no automatic computer generated sound looping; everything is deliberately and painstakingly made by me.

The animations are created by me using Adobe After Effects and Adobe Premiere Pro. Everything in them is completely my own work except the use of occasional stock images, which if used, will be mention in the video's description.

My videos do not contain my voice, as it would detract from the relaxing natural atmosphere I'm trying to cultivate. 

If you like what I do please like, comment and subscribe to help the channel grow!

Subscribe: https://youtube.com/channel/UCDWUVR98lUFs9JWr3f5AGSw?sub_confirmation=1

Thanks for dropping by!

description:
VIDA NO MAR é sobre a paixão pelo mar, é sobre aventura, pescaria e amizade. 

Se você chegou aqui, quero te dizer uma coisa: Sua vida existe pra ser espetacular, cheia de aventura, de emoção, de beleza e a felicidade genuína. Não se contente com menos, faça acontecer. Você veio a esse mundo pra viver uma aventura extraordinária!

Meu nome é Samuelson Vieira, sou apaixonado pela Pesca Sub e pescaria em geral. Desde criança, sempre gostei de pescar de linha com meu pai e pratico a Pesca Sub há mais de 15 anos.

Criei esse canal para compartilhar meu estilo de vida, a Vida no Mar. Quero compartilhar com você um segredo que descobri: a felicidade verdadeira se esconde nas coisas mais simples da vida. 

A felicidade é pisar descalço na areia, é o nascer do sol, é o cheiro do mar... É poder pescar um peixe pra comer com a família, é ver as belezas que existem dentro e fora d'água, é comer um pirão de peixe com as mãos. 

Obrigado de coração pelo apoio! Te vejo na imensidão azul!

description:
Sejam bem vindos a Região do Lagos, vamos apresentar para vocês Arraial do Cabo, o Caribe brasileiro, Cabo Frio, uma das primeiras cidades do Brasil e vamos apresentar Armação de Búzios, conhecida como Búzios a cidade mais chique do Rio de Janeiro, vamos mostrar Saquarema, a Capital do Surf, São Pedro da Aldeia....
Essas cidades ficam localizadas ao norte do Rio de Janeiro, mais ou menos 200 Km de distância.
Com nosso Canal você aprende a chegar em todos os lugares da região, fica por dentro das notícias, transporte, hospedagens, passeios e muito mais, sem contar que vocês vão acompanhar a pesca artesanal mais antiga e sustentável do Brasil, uma arte milenar me que sustenta a população local.
Por que?
Porque já fomos turistas, sabemos quais poderão ser suas dificuldades, suas dúvidas... te daremos um norte. Faremos com que você aproveite o que a cidade tem de melhor para oferecer a você e com privilégios para os seguidores do Canal!
Aproveitem!

description:
We’re an Aussie family of five sharing life from a remote tropical island in the Solomon Islands. 🌴

We live and work off-grid on Uepi Island, managing a SCUBA diving eco-resort while raising our kids barefoot and salty-haired by the sea. From catching & cooking fish over fire to coral restoration and running a full island business, our vlogs are a raw and real look behind the scenes of tropical island life—family chaos, meaningful moments, and wild ocean adventures.

We believe in slow, simple living. Nature first. And sharing the ride.

🎥 Subscribe to follow:
• Off-grid island living
• Coral gardening + ocean conservation
• Raising kids close to nature
• Behind the scenes of running a resort
• Family connection + real adventure

New episodes weekly 🌊

description: My name is Nolan Sheahan! just your average guy with a passion for racing and trail running! I started my journey by training for a Spartan sprint in 2018 back when I couldn’t run a full mile.  Since then I have run 14+ Spartan races all over the US,  qualified for the 2019 North American Championship and the 2019 Spartan World Championship! I love to train for my races at South Mountain in Phoenix where I can find peace on the trails.  In 2020,  I plan on pushing myself to run more miles than I ever have before in an attempt to discover what I’m capable of. I will be attempting to train and run a 100-mile trail race in 2021 and a 250-mile trail race in 2022. Follow me along this journey and wish me luck!

description: 2020. I was 54 — eight weeks on a bedroom floor, no diagnosis yet. Two years of on-and-off pain before the imaging landed in 2022 at 56: two-level spondylolisthesis, fusion recommended by two orthopedic surgeons. The diagnosis was real and so was the recommendation. I decided to try everything else first. I rebuilt over four years through four pillars — exercise, physical therapy used as a teacher (not a prescription), diet, and supplements. Year one was walking without fear. Year two, slow jogs. Year three, running again. Year four, hills. Year five, I signed up for a race. Went from not being able to do a single deadbug to 80 hanging knees to elbows, side planks, reverse planks, hip thrusts, and running 5k's three times a week. Turning 60 in 2026 and training to podium at the Cougar Mountain Trail Series. This channel is the whole thing — the core work, the runs, the setbacks, the proof. description:
дато мого | Сого МТБ
[M]edia [T]alk [B]roadcast [СМИ [Обсуждение [Трансляция]

No day is ever the same as yesterday. Every ride is a blessing—the wind on your face, the freedom to choose your own line, the reminder that you are alive.
SoGo MTB is more than mountain biking. It is a gateway into journeys, growth, and shared passion. From Singapore’s local trails to world-class bike parks like Whistler, every climb and descent tells a story.
Beyond riding, this channel captures bike builds, workshop projects, podcast conversations, and the mindset of curiosity, resilience, and continuous growth.
This is a journey of real experiences, real people, and real purpose. Chase the dream. Create our path. Do what makes us smile.
Whether we ride MTB in Singapore, travel to bike parks, build bikes or simply love the mountain biking lifestyle, we are part of this journey.
The future may be uncertain. But today is real. This moment is real. 

Ride. Build. Share. Live.

description:
Follow along The Adventures of Micah for weekly outdoor and active living dog videos.  Will we be unboxing the hottest toys and fashions, trail running or hiking through the cascade mountains, taking a leisurely stroll on a deserted beach or just lounging away the dog days of summer?  wherever we go along our journey we will share with you the trails we have taken and how to find them,  general pet maintenance and what we feed Micah to sustain her active lifestyle.
We take on the rugged mountain trails and train by running 6 - 12 kms daily in our local area.  Watch as we share all the spectacular events, early morning sunrises, cold rainy streets and clear skies that stretch endlessly over vast mountain canyons.
Subscribe to follow The Adventures of Micah and gain a canis familiaris point of view of this world from those we share it with!

The content here is made by people who love what they do. We are train drivers and want to share our passion with you!

If you would like to join our video contribution team, send us an email.

All content is copyright and requires written permission/licensing for use outside of this channel. Videos that are used without permission will be taken down.

description:
Outdoor Exercise is the perfect channel to forget about boring exercising. Traveling around the world and filming various hikes we thought about how great it can be to experience these places again. And the best way to experience them again is during working out on treadmill, or having indoor cycling training. We decided to share our videos with others, giving people a chance to explore new places during working out at home or in a gym, enjoy the nature scenery and just enjoy the time of training.
Forest trails, mountain paths, backcountry roads – we will do our best to show you more and more new places - to make the process of loosing calories more interesting for you.

ProArtInc Company is the producer of all content posted on this channel and owns all copyrights.
Our filmmakers have been documenting nature since 2010. 100% real, never AI

ALL THE VIDEOS HERE ARE FOR PRIVATE USE ONLY! IF YOU WANT TO USE OUR VIDEOS IN ANY PROJECT, PLEASE, CONTACT US AT proartinc1@gmail.com

description:
Transform your indoor workout into an outdoor adventure. High-fidelity POV trail running designed for treadmills, stationary bikes, rowers, and NuStep/VR users.

The SmartTV & VR Experience
Optimized for large screens and VR headsets in native 4K at 60fps for fluid, life-like motion.

100% Real & Uncut: No AI, no fake overlays, no jump cuts. Just raw, authentic trails.

The "Wow" Factor: Scouting high-impact locations like the walkways of Alquézar, the canyons of Mont-Rebei, and the rugged Garraf Massif.

Premium Viewing: Minimal ads to respect your workout flow and immersion.

Built for Training
Join a global community trading the "dreadmill" for the spectacular vistas of Spain and the Pyrenees.

Subscribe to bring the world's most beautiful trails to your home gym ⛰️☀️🏃

Soy Kevin Broda, rider de e-MTB y freeride. Vengo del BMX, la disciplina que marcó mi estilo: saltar, fluir, buscar líneas creativas y llevar la bici más allá de lo lógico. Esa pasión con la que crecí es la que hoy llevo a las e-bikes, exprimiéndolas con la misma energía, técnica y ganas de volar.
Aquí encontrarás reviews de e-bikes, rutas técnicas, saltos, freeride, análisis sinceros y contenido pensado para que le saques todo el rendimiento a tu bici.

description:
¡Hola y bienvenidos a Enduro MX! Somos un grupo de ciclistas de montaña mexicanos que ama compartir la pasión por este deporte con el mundo. En este canal, encontrarás videos sobre todo lo relacionado con el ciclismo de montaña, desde recorridos de senderos hasta carreras de enduro. También compartiremos consejos y trucos para ayudarte a mejorar tu habilidad en bicicleta, así como entrevistas con algunos de los mejores ciclistas de montaña de México.

Si eres un ciclista de montaña o simplemente te interesa este deporte, te animo a que te suscribas a este canal. ¡Espero verte pronto!

54才のYouTuber、14年前の健康診断でメタボ判定をもらい改心。ダイエット中に走ることの楽しさ＆嬉しさ、そしてたくさんのランナー達と交友の輪が広がる喜びを知りランニングライフにドハマリ！ウルトラ系のトレイルランニングからフルマラソン、ウルトラマラソン、登山マラソンなど種目を問わず走ることなら何でもウェルカム♪この先10年、20年楽しく笑顔で走りつづけていくことが目標です(^^)

・フルマラソン サブスリー10回目（54才にて達成）
・100キロマラソン 10時間切り4回目（54才にて達成）
・100マイルレース Fuji100、OSJ小海100、信越五岳100mile、Lakebiwa100mileなど完走
——
当チャンネルの製品リンクURLはAmazonアソシエイトのリンクを使用しています。

description:
​「MTBと辛口雑談 by 【毒舌MTber 】| トレイルを駆け抜け、本音を語る」
​マウンテンバイク（MTB）のリアルなライディング映像をベースに、世の中の「言いたいけど言えないこと」をひたすら語る、雑談特化型チャンネルです。
​映像は真剣、トークは不真面目。
​【このチャンネルで得られるもの】
​ノンストップの毒舌トーク：視聴者さんのコメント欄や世間の話題に鋭く切り込みます。
​海外スポットのリアル：ツアー動画ではなく、一人の旅行者として体験した現地の「本音」をお届け。
​MTBグッズの忖度なしレビュー：実際に使ってみて感じた、良い点も悪い点も包み隠さず毒舌で評価します。
​トレイルを走る爽快感と、タブーなき本音トークの刺激を同時に楽しみたい方は、ぜひチャンネル登録を！

description:
琵琶湖を有する県でささやかに動画制作をたしなんでおります。
チャンネルジャンルは「動画編集を楽しむための雑食系」です。
「動画のチカラ」を通じで学んだ撮影スキルや編集スキルを向上させながら、
チャンネル登録してくださった方にちょっとズレた視点で楽しさを伝えます。

仕事が忙しくても2週間に1回は更新を目標にします。
3週間に1回が守れなくなったら舌、噛んで死ぬ覚悟。
登録者様YouTube様に見放されないように日々進化することを誓います！

『コバスポビデオの雑食メニュー表』

・琵琶湖を有する滋賀県を舞台にしたVlog
・キックボクシングやマラソンなどのスポーツ系
・家族や知り合いを巻き込んだ短編映画
・動画撮影や編集の備忘録と初心者のつまづきPOINT解決法
・真面目にお仕事をする一面
・お金の節約や投資で役立ったこと
・5人の父親として子育てと教育を語る動画
・その辺のお店や知人とのコラボ動画
・サラリーマンのあがきと叫び
・ジャンルを絞らないこんな動画もありなんだ伝える動画

グッドボタンとチャンネル登録はもちろん、
お気軽にコメント残してくださると嬉しいです。


P.S.
本業はどちらかというとライター寄りの企画営業職です。
「動画のチカラ」の関西支店として動画のお仕事も承ります。
どんな大きな依頼もどんな小さな依頼もビデオグラファー伊藤ノリさんを
筆頭にした映像クリエイター仲間のチカラで解決します。
このチャンネルの動画は営業職の私のクオリティーなので参考にしたらダメです。
是非、こちらのページを通ってご相談ください。
https://www.hakuzenp.co.jp/1517/

description:
Welcome to my channel. My goal is to travel to as many of Scotlands amazing biking destinations as I can and bring you the clearest, smoothest footage possible, to try and help you decide if its somewhere that you would like to visit yourself.

 Firstly I aim to get at least one video a week put up and secondly to build enough of a video library for my channel to be a one stop channel for anyone seeking to find new biking destinations in Scotland.

I have made my decision to grow the channel and it has my full commitment so the videos will come. I would be very grateful to anyone who subscribes as this will help spur me on.

The best thing about Youtube is it is interactive so feel free to comment with your thoughts or even suggest a destination i should go to.

Thanks for visiting my channel.

description:
【ご挨拶】
みなさま、はじめまして。
「Run Yuki - 走れゆうき」です。
基本的に毎週、約2本の動画投稿をさせていただいております。

このチャンネルでは，
「ランニングや運動、旅の魅力を発信」をテーマに、運動することの喜びや、普段のランニングコースをちょっぴりおしゃれに楽しく走れるような動画製作を心がけています。

自分自身、仕事や生活に不安がある中でいつも気持ちを前向きに生きてこれたのはランニングがあったからでした。前向きだからランニングを継続できるのではなく、ランニングが気持ちを前向きにしてくれました。
一人でも多くの方の運するきっかけやランニングの楽しさが伝わればと思います。

どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。

【プロフィール】
生年：1990年
出身地：東京都
好きな言葉："Keep learning and running"


【YouTubeチャンネルの歴史】
2019/07/02｜初投稿
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Nice to meet you, everyone.
It is "Yuki's Life-Run Yuki".
I post every Thursday and Saturday at 19:00.

On this channel
With the theme of "disseminating the appeal of running, exercising, and traveling," I try to create videos that make you feel the joy of exercising and make your usual running course a little fashionable and enjoyable.

I hope that as many people as possible can get the chance to exercise and enjoy running.

Thank you.....

description:
「初心者にも、沼にハマったあなたにも。」

よすけのOutdoor News24では、ULギアやガレージブランドを中心に、
日帰り登山・徒歩キャンプ・100均のプチプラ道具まで、
“実際に使って良かった”アウトドアギアをレビューしています。

軽さと快適さのバランス、
知る人ぞ知るこだわりブランドの魅力、
そして「沼落ち」するほどハマるギアたちを、
現場のリアルな視点で、わかりやすく紹介します。

ギアレビューや商品提供・コラボのご連絡は、
yosukeoutdoor@gmail.com までお気軽にご連絡ください。

※すべてのご連絡に目を通していますが、
ご返信はお約束できかねます。
ご縁があったギアや取り組みには、こちらからご連絡させていただきます。

新しいギアとの出会いが、
アウトドアの楽しみをもっと深くしてくれる──
そんな動画を、今日も届けていきます。

Welcome to Outdoor News24.

We review ultralight gear, garage brands, affordable outdoor tools, and hiking/camping equipment—based on real field use in Japan.

For collaborations or review inquiries:
📩 yosukeoutdoor@gmail.com

We read all messages but may not reply to everyone.
If your gear truly inspires us, we’ll get back to you.

Let’s enjoy this deep and fun world of outdoor gear, together.

【広告について】
このチャンネル「よすけのOutdoor News24」は、Amazon.co.jpを宣伝しリンクすることによってサイトが紹介料を獲得できる手段を提供することを目的に設定されたアフィリエイトプログラムである、Amazonアソシエイト・プログラムの参加者です。

description:
ウルトラマラソンが大好きなウルトラランナーです！！

楽しく走るのもガチで走るのも好きです。
走ることはなんでも大好き！

description:
山と人生のチャンネル「たかくらや」へようこそ。

元登山店店員でロングトレイルも好きです。
最近はトレイルランニングにもハマっています。
好きな国は日本、スイス、ニュージーランド、カナダ。

中学2年生の頃から自然の世界に没頭し、アウトドアの世界に熱中し続けています。山と森から学んだことは今の生き方に活きています。

皆さんを魅惑のアウトドアの世界へ誘います。自然を楽しむ心豊かな人を増やしたい！アウトドア業界全体のプロモーターとして頑張ってます💪どうぞよろしくお願い致します。

description:
This YouTube channel is dedicated to providing immersive experience of outdoor adventures as I explore some of the world's most stunning locations, both near and far from home. I share awe-inspiring journey vistas and valuable destination tips. Join me on my journey through scenic drives, trail running, and hiking challenges. Let me also guide you in selecting the perfect hiking, trail running, and photography gear to enhance your own adventures.

About me: I hold a PhD in computational neuroscience and work as an AI researcher and data scientist. However, this channel celebrates my passions for long-distance running, hiking, and photography—intertwined in a unique fusion.

As a long-distance runner and scientist, I wield a distinctive skill set that enriches my nature exploration. This channel resonates with those who love an active lifestyle and the grandeur of the outdoors.

Subscribe to celebrate our planet's beauty and embrace an active life together.

description:
Welcome to the 【Akai Seeks the Sea】 Channel! 🌊🚴‍♂️

Here, I’ll be sharing my past motorcycle travel experiences, taking you on a journey to explore the breathtaking landscapes of China. As a man who loves freedom, I enjoy chasing an unrestrained life on the road. 🇨🇳✨ Now, I’ve also fallen in love with sidecar riding, and I can’t resist the joy it brings!

On this channel, you’ll see my close bond with motorcycles and the fun and challenges I encounter during my travels. 🏍️💨 Every trip is a reflection of my deep understanding and passion for life, and I hope to share these precious moments with you.

📢 If you enjoy my content, make sure to subscribe and click the bell icon 🔔, so you won’t miss any exciting travel stories! Share your thoughts and suggestions, and let’s explore a more beautiful world together! 🌟

All videos are authorized by creators from Mainland China and strictly adhere to platform regulations. 🛡️

我到新加坡啦！ 背包走過尼泊爾、孟加拉、泰國、馬來西亞，如今站在新加坡的街頭。
人生第七國馬來西亞！我不是在旅行，而是在和生活重新握手！
孟加拉早婚成習的土地上，少女們心中也藏著關於未來的柔軟期待。 離開後很久，我仍會想起那雙眼睛，想起那個短暫卻明亮的笑容，想起在傳統與渴望的夾縫中，年輕生命難以言說的疼痛與嚮往。
一場打破偏見的震撼之旅，孟加拉達卡city walk 原帶著髒亂、貧窮的偏見踏上孟加拉，初到所見似印證預想
旅途中最難忘的，從來不是計劃好的景點打卡。而是意料之外的相遇 #宣傳正能量 #記錄生活 #vlog旅行記 #看世界 #孟加拉

description:
Welcome to my Channel. I'm Bike Riding Adam and I am a Manchester based Motovlogger who posts daily to social media, the mishaps and often unintentionally funny musings of my daily commute on my Royal Enfield Interceptor 650. I also post longer videos and Motorbike reviews

Questions for Bikers is a series, where I travel around the UK, meeting bikers from all walks of life. Shining a light on the awesome people within the biking community. From Moto Vloggers to Moto GP Riders and from Motorbike Gear shops to Motorbike Gear manufacturers, who knows who I will meet on these adventures.

I also share my Adventures with Adam where you can come along and join me on little adventures around the UK

From hidden gems and scenic rides to bike shops, dealerships, cosy cafés and must-visit foodie spots, I share the places I discover and the memories along the way. My son George often comes along, and those adventures are always hilarious!

description:
We don't just review motorcycles; We explore why they matter, and how some motorcycles satisfy your soul... and others don't.
This isn't a motorcycle news channel, and it isn't a buyer's guide. We're Mr Darcy & The Ol' Man; a father and son fascinated by motorcycles with soul, character and style. Through honest conversations, cinematic rides and thoughtful comparisons, we explore the bikes, people and places that keep motorcycle culture alive. We don't try to cover everything. We follow our curiosity, challenge convention and ask bigger questions about design, heritage, craftsmanship and what gives a motorcycle lasting appeal. If you believe motorcycles are about more than transport, you're among friends.

description:
瑞士资讯SWI swissinfo.ch是瑞士广播电视集团(Swiss Broadcasting Corporation)旗下的国际服务机构，其前身是瑞士国际广播电台。我们秉承“立足瑞士 报道世界”的原则，提供关于瑞士的独立报道，以瑞士的视角看世界。

瑞士作为一个中立国，有着独特的政治体系，在这里以视频的形式我们为你解读瑞士特有的民主制度，以及经济、文化、旅游、教育和全民关注的社会话题。无论你是想来留学还是工作，这里都是你了解瑞士的最佳窗口。

description:
楚格山里人滑雪是生活在阿尔卑斯山中的中国人（华人）一韬和小Cong建立的频道，这个频道专注单板双板滑雪和户外运动，帮助更多的雪友享受滑雪的乐趣。
有雪场攻略，滑雪教学（单板教学&双板教学），滑雪装备，滑雪百科等专栏。

单板双板滑雪教学包括从初学入门到进阶精通针对各个水平滑雪者的教程，双板平行，Carving，陡坡，鼓包，粉雪，单板平花等等内容。
雪场攻略包括阿尔卑斯和全球各大雪场 如 Zermatt采尔马特，Ischgl/Samnaun, Sölden索尔登， Hintertux, Verbier韦尔比耶，Davos达沃斯, St. Anton am Arlberg圣安东，Val Thorens 三峡谷，Tignes, Chamonix霞慕尼，Dolomiti多乐美地, Serfaus-Fiss-Ladis, Kitzbühl, Saalbach, Laax, St. Moritz圣莫里茨，Mayrhofen， Stubaier Glacier等雪场


还有中欧滑雪协会覆盖欧洲阿尔卑斯山各个国家的华人雪友。

description:
尋找不只是好看，還能在實際滑雪或旅行時實實在在助你一臂之力的影片嗎？那麼，你來對地方了！我是Leo！

一個對細節和流程有著近乎執著堅持的工程師。將透過親身經歷，去分享最實用與滑雪相關的資訊。

每個影片都注入了豐富的知識性與實用性，確保你在享受精彩影片的同時，也能為你下一次冒險做充分的準備。

本頻道專為真正希望「行前做足準備、行中無憂患」的你量身打造。立刻訂閱，和我一起滑向未知，開展難忘的滑雪冒險之旅吧！

因單人經營，盡力月更一部詳細工具類型長片！
雪季滑雪繁忙，長片更新可能暫停，請關注shorts!

description: 墾趣成立於1994年12月1日，我們從原先一家專賣戶外服飾的小店開始發展，目前我們已經擁有9個門市、12個百貨專櫃，全國並有近300家長期配合的經銷商伙伴，涵蓋戶外、休閒、旅遊、運動、單車、流行等領域。多年來我們專注於戶外休閒旅遊產業，跨足品牌代理、批發經銷與零售通路，期許成為戶外旅遊的專業領導廠商，持續引進世界各國先進舒適的各類服飾與用品，以滿足消費者多樣化的戶外活動需求。

description:
很久以前初次與朋友去紐西蘭滑雪，在什麼都不懂的狀況下，在滑雪的過程中受了傷摔斷肋骨，因此這讓我認為應該正確的學習這個運動，後來去日本滑雪時請了教練，覺得自己真心愛上這個運動，因為身處不是雪國的台灣，所以當時找了一些影片想要強化自己的滑雪觀念，為下次出發做準備，發現大部分拍得比較好的影片都是國外的，中文語言教學影片相對稀少，加上身邊朋友有這個需求，想說我既然都看了不如將影片上個字幕，也為了方便大家觀看，於是就設立這個頻道，頻道內的教學影片版權都是屬於原始擁有者的，在下並無營利行為。

現在在看這個頻道的雪友們，希望這些影片能對您學習滑雪上有所幫助～
滑雪是專項極限運動，影片只是輔助，不能只看了影片沒請教練就貿然嘗試喔～

我喜歡潛水、喜歡爬山、喜歡用各種方式接觸大自然、感受這個世界，更喜歡用影像紀錄這一切

不只是旅行？那是什麼？

對我來說旅行從來都不只是風景與美食，而是我認識世界、愛上世界的生活方式，而生活從來都不是完美的，生活裡有美有醜、有好的有壞的、有順心有不如意、有溫柔的暖陽也有狂風暴雨，但人生重要的從來都不是一場完美的旅行，而是這些都造就了現在的你

旅行不只是旅行，藉由旅行，我完成了更種挑戰、認識了自己從未關注的議題、遇到了在各個角落擁有夢想的人、回到日常生活也成了更勇敢的人，藉由旅行，我看見世界各種樣貌，也一次次接受全新的自己。

Celine’s Way不只是旅行，紀錄了我認識世界的方式，希望能藉由我的影片種下你們出發旅行的種子。

description:
📷 Instagram @ninijiang

❤ Welcome to my YouTube Channel!
大家好！我是妮妮江，来自中国，目前定居在新加坡。我15岁到新加坡学习，毕业后在这里工作。我喜欢分享生活中的点滴、美食探店、户外冒险和文化体验。希望通过我的影片，能和大家一起发现美，感受美，在平淡无奇的日常中，寻找生活带给我们的乐趣。

Hi everyone! I’m Ninijiang, originally from China and now living in Singapore. I moved here at 15 to study and have been working here since graduating. I enjoy sharing everyday moments, food discoveries, outdoor adventures, and cultural experiences. Through my videos, I hope to inspire you to find beauty in life’s little joys and appreciate the ordinary moments.

channel_name: 山生海歸 Lyle’s Mermaid Journey
description:
"Born in the mountains, destined for the sea."

I'm Lyle — a child of the forest, raised by the mountains but called by the deep.
Here, I share my transformation from fearing the water to becoming a mermaid,
a journey that began with a single tail and led me, step by step, into the deep blue.

Join me as I dive into the depths of both the ocean and the soul,
in search of the freedom and purity that only the sea can offer.

description:

description:
XTERRA 創造獨特的戶外探索體驗，凝聚全球越野運動愛好者一起玩野、愛野。

XTERRA inspires outdoor adventures and brings together a global community of off-road enthusiasts in order to enjoy and protect the environment.

XTERRA 的故事從 1990 年代開始，於夏威夷茂宜島舉辦的 XTERRA 越野三項世錦賽，至今已成為全球規模最大的國際性越野三項賽事；每年在 33 個國家舉辦超過三百場比賽，100,000 位最「野」耐力運動參賽者完成各項挑戰：全程越野三項、越野兩項以及短距離繞圈挑戰賽，踏出舒適圈、縱橫世界秘境，開拓前所未見眼界。

對於全球越野愛好者來說，XTERRA 不僅是比賽，更是一種生活態度，喚醒我們與好友一同探索自然的天性。

What started in Hawaii in the 1990s as an off-road triathlon grew into a lifestyle supporting sustainable events for 100k+ of our closest friends at more than 300 events spread across 5 continents.  From surprise packed trail runs, mountain biking events for all levels, to Short Tracks, duathlons, and full on triathlons, XTERRA gives participants the chance to get out of the gym, off of the paved roads and away from their all too familiar surroundings. 

XTERRA is more than an event - it is a year round lifestyle to be lived and shared with friends.
#weplayweprotect #xterrataiwan

description:
2019 這年間，行過了不少山頭，也知道每個山峰，都會有多條路線給大家去選擇，要揀啱屬於自己啱行個路線，最後同樣地也會到達目的地。而行山可以體驗人生，汗水可以令你洗滌心靈，膚色變黑可以令你變得更硬淨，更堅強。

今次零的開始，就是想告訴比自己知，要重新用自己來爬起來，唔好唸，唔好驚，更加唔好震 (驚咩？)  ……所以要比心機，好好將由 "零" 開始 ，用自己一步步紀錄下來。好好去提醒自己，每一次努力，已經唔再需要用以往思維去被捆綁，今次憑感覺去做，放鬆心情去做，用去愛一個人熱情去做，總之就當做緊自己最喜愛個嘢心態做 ~ 就掂！

大家有時間，不妨可以 Follow 埋我 IG & FB，會有不定時更新山系點滴和新片分享。

感謝一直訂閱我的谷友們、同嗜和好朋友們支持 ❢

咁當然好歡迎新訂閱『你們』，你們每一個少少讚好，每一個少少訂閲，都能夠帶給我好大動力，令我繼續學習同前進 ❢ 

最後多謝繼續支持、讚好、留言、分享 ❢

channel_name: 中移動香港行山節CMHK Hong Kong Hiking Festival
description:
I. 活動概況：
根據香港政府的「普及健體運動──社區體質測試計劃」公佈，「行山」是最多市民參與的體能運動，世界衛生組織亦認同「步行」是最好的體能運動，而美國最新健康指引也建議每天累積走路1小時、或累積走10,000步，即可以消耗熱量，避免發胖。近日更有一項資料顯示，香港巿民是全球每天平均步行最多的地區，香港人每天平均步行步數約為6,880步！香港擁有獨特的遠足及步行天然環境，在全港24個郊野公園當中，被CNN譽為「全球最佳20條行山徑」之一的麥理浩徑，以及被Lonely Planet稱為「最佳香港行山徑」的龍脊，皆屬世界級的郊野遠足路線。

『中移動香港行山節』謹訂於2018年12月16日（星期日）上午假山頂舉行「啟動禮」為活動揭開序幕，活動以「全港動起來．向健康出發」為主題，鼓勵市民利用工餘、課餘或空閒的時間，到全港24個郊野公園遠足，達致「全民運動，健康生活」的目標。市民可以透過中國移動香港智能手機應用程式MyLink內的「WeWalk」頁面登記參加當天活動，「WeWalk」內更包含精選行山路線介紹及行山小貼士。
大會網頁：https://www.wewalk.hk/

II. 活動目的：
以「推動全民運動，共享健康生活」為目標及以行山運動為主題，舉辦一項大型活動，冀每年透過活動鼓勵市民行山，增強體能和促進健康，並結合資訊科技及大數據，令行山運動更安全、更科學、更有趣味。

III. 活動口號：
為健康、一齊行

IV. 組織架構：
主辦機構 - 
中國香港旅行遠足聯會：以推廣旅行遠足康體活動為宗旨的非牟利志願團體
 （*有關聯會的資料，請瀏覽網址：http://www.hkha-china.org.hk）
 中國移動香港：
 （*有關中國移動香港的資料，請瀏覽網址：https://www.hk.chinamobile.com）

description:
Kathy and Alex 頻道的主題是背包自助旅遊影片，介紹自由行路線策劃, 世界風光及當地美食, 發掘新的旅遊路線, 廉價住宿及機票, 酒店開箱。我們自由行方式主要交通是火車、巴士及雙腳, 用最經濟方法旅遊最多地方, 可以說是深度遊的窮遊。

已經旅遊國家包括中國、印度、尼泊爾、英國、荷蘭、比利時、西德、法國、瑞士、奧地利等等歐洲國家、日本、台灣、韓國、泰國、馬來西亞、新加坡、印尼、越南、柬埔寨、菲律賓、杜拜、阿拉伯聯合酋長國、美國、加拿大…..等等國家。

近年自由行喜歡去日本、台灣、泰國深度遊, 逗留日子比較長, 不再追求多遊景點。

當沒有出國旅遊時, 有空就會到香港各處行山遠足, 曾走遍香港各大小山巒和溪谷, 也會拍成影片和大家分享。

除了發佈自助旅遊影片到 YouTube, 也有發佈到我們的「背包客網」BackpackerWebs.com 網誌, 歡迎瀏覽:

https://www.BackpackerWebs.com

喜歡的話，請訂閱我們的頻道!

channel_name: DNT FPV 中國香港無人機總會 FPV無人機 穿越機教學頻道
description:
中國香港無人機總會 (DNT FPV)成立於2015年, 致力於向世界各地推廣FPV穿越機文化.  在本地我們向各界提供無人機及競速穿越機的航空教育.  了解如何 
自組及裝嵌無人機.  學習在安全環境下操作無人機及安全駕駛的意識等等…… 透過訓練、提供本地和海外FPV無人機組織交流活動.  參與海外國際賽事.  

令到任何有興趣體驗飛行的人, 享受到飛行的樂趣.

DNT FPV Drone Racing Association Hong Kong., China
 (DNT FPV) establish since 2015.  From a small whatsapp group, become one of the largest drone organization / NGO / education academy in Hong Kong with over 2000 student.    

We believe and help teenage able to dreams and acheive it.   We share our vision to young kids and anyone who enjoy flying the right path to start.

The implementation of drones in the fields of sustainability and scientific research is already a reality that opens the door to a future full of possibilities.   Start now~ Fly High.~!

description:
从2000年就开始在互联网企业中工作，做过前端工程师、后端工程师、架构师、公司CTO。主要行业在互联网广告，构建过超大流量的互联网广告交易系统。目前作为独立开发者在尝试开发自己喜欢的应用产品。

平日我们和周围的环境总是处在水平视角，周围的高楼、树木等阻挡了我们的视线。我们想使用大疆DJI FPV用第一人称视角，从高空看看日常生活的环境。

希望我们制作的视频能让你喜欢，也希望你能关注我们的频道，给我们各种改进的建议

I have been working in an Internet company since 2000. I have been a front-end engineer, back-end engineer, architect, and company CTO. The main industry is in Internet advertising, and has built an Internet advertising transaction system with large traffic. Currently, as an independent developer, I am trying to develop my favorite application products.

On weekdays, we and the surrounding environment are always in a horizontal perspective, and the surrounding tall buildings, trees, etc. block our sight. We want to use DJI FPV to view the environment of daily life from a high altitude in a first-person perspective.

I hope the video we made will make you like it, and I hope you can follow our channel and give us various suggestions for improvement.

description:
Hey y'all!

我们是大熊和肉丸子 ;) 我们在中国长大在美国忙里偷闲体验大自然 - hiking/backpacking/diving/climbing/off roading/wind surfing/surfing/water sports 都是我们的最爱！！ COVID让我们感受到时间的珍贵，让我们开启了房车旅行，周游了美国数十州，挑战了很多新的领域，慢慢地也我们也变成了一个更好的自己。 

希望我们的视频能让你看到大自然/人世间不同的面貌！如果你也是爱好户外的人 ，不妨考虑关注一下哦！我们会不定期更新有意思的户外旅行内容！ 希望我们的欢笑也能给你们带来欢乐！

Thank you for following our JourneyING!

Business Email: DZ.JourneyING@gmail.com

description:
I'm Fang! I have a deep passion for camping, hiking, backpacking, cycling, and skiing. The great outdoors is an integral part of my life, and I absolutely love capturing these adventures on video. My hope is to take you on a journey to experience the breathtaking beauty of the wilderness with me.

He is Qian, just like me, he adores wandering through the wild landscapes, using his camera to capture scenes that are brimming with imagination. 

Together, we explore the world, and we want to share our explorations with all of you. We sincerely appreciate your subscriptions. Thank you for joining us on this incredible adventure!

description:
EstherTheFlyingRoamer
A channel featuring the best of my world: Travel & Music. 

關於我:
Esther 為多元音樂創作人，社區音樂人，註冊音樂治療師，樂器收藏家及背包旅行者。以踏進世界不同文化角落融合多元音樂，模糊古典現代界限，創造無彊界的音樂為樂。

About Me: 
Esther Wong, a composer, arranger, music teacher, music therapist and a traveler. Inspired by music around the world and all her travelling experiences, her style of music blends the modern with the traditional. From orchestral, instrumental, electronica, ambient to world fusion. Recently pursued the path of becoming a music therapist, using music to impact people’s lives.
​
http://inspiremmusictherapy.com   Inspirem Music & Therapy (HK)

Hey everyone!  My name is Kevin, and welcome to the channel Drum Runner.  My goal is to share the joy of mountain biking creatively from a drummers perspective.  

As an average rider, I combine my passion for the bike trails with my drumming background.  Audio production and recording mountain bike videos is my creative circle that fuels itself.  Ride, record, produce, repeat.

I bike mostly in Atlanta and North Georgia, and I hope to bring inspiration from the creative outdoors, see you on the trails!

description:
Hi folks,
my videos are about the famous Suzuki Hayabusa and the legendary Yamaha R1.
Videos are recorded with the GoPro Hero 5 and DJI Osmo Action 6, maybe doing some Vlogs/manuals/repairs in the future....
I´m a motorcycle and car technician/mechanic and enthusiastic rider, living in germany. 
Welcome to the ride you didn’t know you needed.

This isn’t just a motorcycle channel — it’s a front-row seat to raw speed, untamed roads, and the kind of freedom most people only dream about. From high-adrenaline rides and tech videos, this channel is built for those who feel the pull of the throttle in their soul.

Whether you're chasing your first bike, upgrading your machine, or living life one ride at a time — you're in the right place.
No fake hype. Just engines, asphalt, and the truth about life on two wheels.


If you have any questions or requests, comment or pm me.

Always ride safe, wear safety gear and have fun!
